name: Eli Bremer
subject: That’s right. ONE.
body:
Colorado Deserves Better
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctrwdl-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctrwdl-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | Did you know Michael Bennet has authored ONE bill in his 12 years in Washington? ONE.
He was the 7th most absent member out of all the Senators in 2019. That same year, he missed more days than 97 of his colleagues. There were only 7 Senators who missed more than him, does this sound like someone who is getting the job done?
Clearly, Michael Bennet is missing in action and is taking you for granted, he doesn’t even show up to his day job. He is more interested in attending DC cocktail parties than working for the people of Colorado. He’s happy to follow and sees no reason to lead. He is not working for us.
[**It is time for a change. **](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctrwdl-ykykmujid-t/)
[**We need a free-thinker and a problem solver**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctrwdl-ykykmujid-i/) \- Not someone who does what the party leadership tells him. We don’t need someone focused on positioning himself for the next office. Remember Senator Bennet’s failed attempt at running for President? It’s easy to forget.
[**We can’t end his paid vacation without you, please consider joining us today?**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctrwdl-ykykmujid-d/)
---
[Donate Now](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctrwdl-ykykmujid-h/)

**Veteran, Olympian, Lifelong Republican, Fighter for Colorado,**
**Eli Bremer**

We are building out our team now to ensure everything is in place for Election 2022

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb89992303cf49f5808db58f57c3cd0d&_e=BYhrOPnAOyg2eUfMAvazwweN2ZFBGT-1rl74BRkQsX-H6wIrNz80PXPmJIf2ueftRLINyTmTdp82-nbKAyBg9Gjrpit-QifyJ4T8DoJYoxueAcxC-bvf46hWF4BGP8_to-vsuU38Rw8N33qX9_OKfTO6qw3NJrgSrsLsZ-fgRr4MpU4sv0WO_6DRpugAHGEuzUKKbX6EjNgjTx452TVfNDGjuUZw8jDgAuqqwAm0fPJ4ZYrWv4yiIWYntbaPxbW8gt9lKu7q92rilHmWUPKCPZ3xvWQZ6fz-e1WTVllBoufeEaCYSIim0vA0EqscoS6PelbrNlxjb6KNwdfRhgojpy9zml9jSDHTYkCIglzA0v8%3D)
---

Peter,

What if I told you that even just $1 dollar could make a difference as me and my Republican colleagues work to take back control of the House from the socialist Democrats next November? **[Would you donate $1?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb89992303cf49f5808db58f57c3cd0d&_e=BYhrOPnAOyg2eUfMAvazwweN2ZFBGT-1rl74BRkQsX-H6wIrNz80PXPmJIf2ueftRLINyTmTdp82-nbKAyBg9Gjrpit-QifyJ4T8DoJYoxueAcxC-bvf46hWF4BGP8_to-vsuU38Rw8N33qX9_OKfdaLxvaeQTBYqAFfFyWH8A9dX-1KucbFa-_YpoVRTMF_0pqxEgzL4QSJOAKAP-WLqxRbIquy6V-ZZqxl_YUsdoMtBldjcIeVwq1k6TMv4wHOBvs1ae-gE_AFqys8BxGAmITrNPXxdrElCqmK2DM0PGBvW6KdZL3dFowj1550Fj2D0Nolyhmr70Lmuo65GbRhBinbiidv_QTB_CHzRAllIHI%3D)**

We’re playing the long game. Every day from now until the election is a day which we can lay out our case to the American public as to why it’s important to kick left-wing Democrats to the curb and restore some common-sense conservative leadership to the House.

By now, you are probably well aware that if we don’t do anything to stand in their way, Democrats are going to bankrupt the United States. And the best part? They’re using the same approach that they did when then jammed Obamacare through the House ten years ago. **When the price tag of a bill in consideration is $3.5 TRILLION, we ought to take the time to make sure we know what’s in it before we pass it**.

[**HELP US TAKE BACK THE HOUSE
CHIP IN $1 OR MORE->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb89992303cf49f5808db58f57c3cd0d&_e=BYhrOPnAOyg2eUfMAvazwweN2ZFBGT-1rl74BRkQsX-H6wIrNz80PXPmJIf2ueftRLINyTmTdp82-nbKAyBg9Gjrpit-QifyJ4T8DoJYoxueAcxC-bvf46hWF4BGP8_to-vsuU38Rw8N33qX9_OKfYIpUuKixmyDKxsi2HdifOoFAurskxnVeOUONOqRDufVWnCzIjGcyNOSgEpCXB0NZjYW8WDztlaSMJxFuyNlpYeaRRSC4vqzPRXjPjYn83PmjmqqFDAxyYWjjMQU9M3n78U7yN8FZYBLO7qk5icvy869JENeSRzRmSWytfN6OzPq3EMmsZSTbCTjx3UUxTF-nxoyMsiTY5Ykh-KGTIJ7Y3Q%3D)

**But no. The Democrat in charge of moving the bill through the house said recently** ,

_"detailing tax-increase plans too soon can give too much time for opposition to build."_

**No way??**

**[If that crooked DC insider way of thinking upsets you as much as it upsets me, please consider contributing $1 or more right now toward my team’s efforts to send Democrats back into the minority.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb89992303cf49f5808db58f57c3cd0d&_e=BYhrOPnAOyg2eUfMAvazwweN2ZFBGT-1rl74BRkQsX-H6wIrNz80PXPmJIf2ueftRLINyTmTdp82-nbKAyBg9Gjrpit-QifyJ4T8DoJYoxueAcxC-bvf46hWF4BGP8_to-vsuU38Rw8N33qX9_OKfXl5u6LeKO_aDynCSLeEJlzLnZfy9EhpnKWVv8hYD2TWxeBpTxERu86_feBgMrnuWy5_02R_mL5bX7g736MfuEzM8OmB8IQ2yF776b1AhvgQoRhfXgFB95rVfIiEeyFLeaKpOa11h8a961KdZm62skuLXwf5Jx6sFos9_9rLRhrXwqnyfd1CLSDh5pBVSGmb88ENHiWdrb1Ftt_TWcGIMVI%3D)**

For America,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb89992303cf49f5808db58f57c3cd0d&_e=BYhrOPnAOyg2eUfMAvazwweN2ZFBGT-1rl74BRkQsX-H6wIrNz80PXPmJIf2ueftRLINyTmTdp82-nbKAyBg9Gjrpit-QifyJ4T8DoJYoxueAcxC-bvf46hWF4BGP8_to-vsuU38Rw8N33qX9_OKfUHLFZpYIDtz5_umcFR1NwkdItqrLqtmaARdbG7dY799W7TqOZKm560uG-sAcAz7lQouXdO-9EYwK5u-m7u72l0-hJKFcX9TCBhufZq7kGXRKcJbcKZ6Lyc2AkgnltQxEzGvdtF-0f1amv7n42pc2oWCcqkEdFux0mjZLDkUTFRhy3HGVv6CHv1D9uoqqhHsMF3fnaW2hCCWYKQHeanNXAs%3D)

subject: Beto O’ Rourke is speaking out:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Our Democrats have refused to give up the fight to defend reproductive rights in the wake of Texas' abortion ban. And now, Beto O'Rourke is calling grassroots Democrats everywhere to action. Will you join this Texan hero, or will you sit on the sidelines while Republicans push more anti-choice laws in states all across the country? We're counting on you to make the right choice and chip in $3 straight away to defeat anti-choice House Republicans >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTL-)**

We need your immediate attention.

**FIRST:**

Texas Republicans, with the help of the far-right Supreme Court, enacted an **OUTRAGEOUS** ban on abortions after six weeks.

**BUT THEN: **

Texas' very own Beto O'Rourke jumped into action to **CONDEMN** this attack on reproductive rights -- and called grassroots Democrats everywhere to **RISE UP** :

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)

**NOW:**

**[We're calling on 1,000 of our very best supporters to answer Beto's call by chipping in $3 to protect our pro-choice House Majority and hand anti-choice Republicans a STUNNING defeat. Can we count on your help straight away?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_VfxV~)
---

**Beto is absolutely right: We must meet this moment with action to defend our fundamental rights.**

Because right now, Trump and his anti-choice Republicans are counting on supporters like you to pack up and go home.

As Democrats, we **MUST** show them that we're not going down without a fight -- and that our House Majority is here to stay.

[**So please: Can we count on your $3 to be one of the 1,000 grassroots contributions we 're counting on to help elect pro-choice House Democrats all across the country?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We're fighting to WIN BACK THE SENATE MAJORITY, but we need your help. Please WATCH this quick video I recorded. | Peter, I'm in-between sets of exercises during my workout, but I wanted to reach out to you. Peter, the left is coming. Senate Democrats see my conservative campaign as a threat to their progressive agenda - even though THEY ARE CRIPPLING HARD-WORKING FAMILIES. But Democrats don't get it, Peter. Because the harder they come at me - the more I train to get ready to beat them. I strive on being the most prepared person in the room, and this campaign for the U.S. Senate is no different. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Donald J. Trump September 20th, 2021
Anybody that changes the name of the once storied Cleveland Indians to the Cleveland Guardians should not be running for the United States Senate representing the Great People of Ohio. The Atlanta Braves didn’t change their name, and the Florida State Seminoles didn’t change their chant, but Cleveland has, and they were there first. Despite this, a man named Matt Dolan, the son of the owner of the team, said he is against Cancel Culture. Do those two things really work together? In any event, I know of at least one person in the race who I won’t be endorsing. The Republican Party has too many RINOs!

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z40kpl2cdr0c0ijgcjucaif4c120bhmn64jqsuoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6co74c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkchg74t3mmmpr4t776lgn2dtksdired74edq36olhemoe3c70mdh6edpke8qj0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cj66jgb6phnmtgmcd70m9h3csh5u)
| This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsic1sqmmimmlbaicgmsa5bic3k5r2v4fcknua6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6co74c9h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zap95d11foksv5jju42ujfq1m8kembfpt3l8s5m0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6co74c9h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdok727ncgt6c9ah84r73oko6i211m4tsr6sj0r8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6co74c9h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0s4rpgloqgrfcjmamnrj50jongm0ii0kfan81p0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6co74c9h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z11bn6f1fmvg3s4p76kqhbl5gk69lhjjnm5hihuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6co74c9h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Peter,

What if I told you that even just $1 dollar could make a difference as me and my Republican colleagues work to take back control of the House from the socialist Democrats next November? **[Would you donate $1?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58834570:WxnKCgdMN:m:1:2247059263:E3F837A5CC6CB9C4FB7797817200AB94:r)**

By now, you are probably well aware that if we don't do anything to stand in their way, Democrats are going to bankrupt the United States. And the best part? **No way??**

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Why I’m Pro-Life…
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wk_kWtCuqeaOfHq3ZG701CePdwxZGMldJLgfSKNu9cwd94MtY-sg0m_BGHcNGyqSYKOvsu34LmN9PcisFNP3MCnfxaFQQebKMKMAbJmrNlrJWHefeer8dhMxzBKATQjqBlMKbidgj4RZ5KYP3o0bVJ_5M7wCIINSITaNboQUauv7xUqCWBjwcrLp5mLyZp0j&c=WPkI2SCL9c9wPtpYDkFCuHE0vKZ9Tjam4lPJj_gq5hQs5iuO8NnJrw==&ch=cKc8ZKsZWsilEt8Cxrr4_orUM0rsTQuPDBSlGAlsj851uDQvRBDPcQ==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| I want to take a moment today to tell you the story of why I am proud to call myself a staunch Pro-Life candidate for US Senate... and how I got to this point through a deeply personal, heartbreaking ordeal.
I hope you'll take the time to watch the video of my story - and please be warned that it covers some very difficult themes.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wk_kWtCuqeaOfHq3ZG701CePdwxZGMldJLgfSKNu9cwd94MtY-sg0m_BGHcNGyqSYKOvsu34LmN9PcisFNP3MCnfxaFQQebKMKMAbJmrNlrJWHefeer8dhMxzBKATQjqBlMKbidgj4RZ5KYP3o0bVJ_5M7wCIINSITaNboQUauv7xUqCWBjwcrLp5mLyZp0j&c=WPkI2SCL9c9wPtpYDkFCuHE0vKZ9Tjam4lPJj_gq5hQs5iuO8NnJrw==&ch=cKc8ZKsZWsilEt8Cxrr4_orUM0rsTQuPDBSlGAlsj851uDQvRBDPcQ==)
---
| | | [SUPPORT THE RIGHT TO LIFE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wk_kWtCuqeaOfHq3ZG701CePdwxZGMldJLgfSKNu9cwd94MtY-sg0m_BGHcNGyqSYKOvsu34LmN9PcisFNP3MCnfxaFQQebKMKMAbJmrNlrJWHefeer8dhMxzBKATQjqBlMKbidgj4RZ5KYP3o0bVJ_5M7wCIINSITaNboQUauv7xUqCWBjwcrLp5mLyZp0j&c=WPkI2SCL9c9wPtpYDkFCuHE0vKZ9Tjam4lPJj_gq5hQs5iuO8NnJrw==&ch=cKc8ZKsZWsilEt8Cxrr4_orUM0rsTQuPDBSlGAlsj851uDQvRBDPcQ==)
---
| When I signed up to join the Army Reserves I had to show my birth certificate. Looking at that piece of paper, a few big revelations really resonated with me. First, my mother's gender was listed as "Negro Girl." And second, her age? My mother was 12 years old when I was born. I remember the gut-wrenching feeling when I realized something that is still very hard for me to say even to this day - my mother was raped when she was just a child. But my mother was surrounded by adults who saw the value of my life. They did not place the consequences on me, the unborn child, that squarely belongs with the perpetrator of the wrong.
Because my family chose life, I have had the opportunity to achieve the American Dream and start a loving family of my own. I'm currently even in the position to take care of my mother. My story proves that there is sanctity in ALL life - and that's a position that I will always champion in public office.
I'm eternally grateful to my family for choosing life. And I'm living proof that all life is precious - no matter how it was conceived.
---
| | | [JOIN ME: SUPPORT THE RIGHT TO LIFE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wk_kWtCuqeaOfHq3ZG701CePdwxZGMldJLgfSKNu9cwd94MtY-sg0m_BGHcNGyqSYKOvsu34LmN9PcisFNP3MCnfxaFQQebKMKMAbJmrNlrJWHefeer8dhMxzBKATQjqBlMKbidgj4RZ5KYP3o0bVJ_5M7wCIINSITaNboQUauv7xUqCWBjwcrLp5mLyZp0j&c=WPkI2SCL9c9wPtpYDkFCuHE0vKZ9Tjam4lPJj_gq5hQs5iuO8NnJrw==&ch=cKc8ZKsZWsilEt8Cxrr4_orUM0rsTQuPDBSlGAlsj851uDQvRBDPcQ==)
---
| I'm eternally grateful that my family chose to allow me to be born. And I'm living proof that all life is precious - no matter how it was conceived.
I know that I'm capable of defending conservative, America First, Pro-Life values because I'm living proof of why we need them.
[God bless you for anything you can lend today to make sure these values are advanced in our nation's capital.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wk_kWtCuqeaOfHq3ZG701CePdwxZGMldJLgfSKNu9cwd94MtY-sg0m_BGHcNGyqSYKOvsu34LmN9PcisFNP3MCnfxaFQQebKMKMAbJmrNlrJWHefeer8dhMxzBKATQjqBlMKbidgj4RZ5KYP3o0bVJ_5M7wCIINSITaNboQUauv7xUqCWBjwcrLp5mLyZp0j&c=WPkI2SCL9c9wPtpYDkFCuHE0vKZ9Tjam4lPJj_gq5hQs5iuO8NnJrw==&ch=cKc8ZKsZWsilEt8Cxrr4_orUM0rsTQuPDBSlGAlsj851uDQvRBDPcQ==)
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wk_kWtCuqeaOfHq3ZG701CePdwxZGMldJLgfSKNu9cwd94MtY-sg0m_BGHcNGyqSYKOvsu34LmN9PcisFNP3MCnfxaFQQebKMKMAbJmrNlrJWHefeer8dhMxzBKATQjqBlMKbidgj4RZ5KYP3o0bVJ_5M7wCIINSITaNboQUauv7xUqCWBjwcrLp5mLyZp0j&c=WPkI2SCL9c9wPtpYDkFCuHE0vKZ9Tjam4lPJj_gq5hQs5iuO8NnJrw==&ch=cKc8ZKsZWsilEt8Cxrr4_orUM0rsTQuPDBSlGAlsj851uDQvRBDPcQ==)
---
| Thanks for taking the time to hear my story.
Blessings,
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | Peter, | I want to take a moment today to tell you the story of why I am proud to call myself a staunch Pro-Life candidate for US Senate... and how I got to this point through a deeply personal, heartbreaking ordeal. I hope you'll take the time to watch the video of my story - and please be warned that it covers some very difficult themes. | == | | | == | When I signed up to join the Army Reserves I had to show my birth certificate. Looking at that piece of paper, a few big revelations really resonated with me. First, my mother's gender was listed as "Negro Girl." And second, her age? My mother was 12 years old when I was born. I remember the gut-wrenching feeling when I realized something that is still very hard for me to say even to this day - my mother was raped when she was just a child. But my mother was surrounded by adults who saw the value of my life. They did not place the consequences on me, the unborn child, that squarely belongs with the perpetrator of the wrong. Because my family chose life, I have had the opportunity to achieve the American Dream and start a loving family of my own. I'm currently even in the position to take care of my mother. My story proves that there is sanctity in ALL life - and that's a position that I will always champion in public office. I'm eternally grateful to my family for choosing life. And I'm living proof that all life is precious - no matter how it was conceived. | | | == | I'm eternally grateful that my family chose to allow me to be born. And I'm living proof that all life is precious - no matter how it was conceived. I know that I'm capable of defending conservative, America First, Pro-Life values because I'm living proof of why we need them. == | | | == | Thanks for taking the time to hear my story. Blessings, | == | Kathy Barnette | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. Box 659 , Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006-0659 | | Sent by mailto:info@barnetteforsenate.com powered by

subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Dear Fellow American, Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a li
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2p2qe1aot20le326pt2nd07ov349sa80nv5ni2g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrm3ddks6rrfddk6jjr0tr0m5gm7chh6pjrdc5km6qb2tr669gn6d736lhj1o30cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im9j39o5jcgrr4sj66jgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c9h64pb3c9h649fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z822tfrqqueolmolj6fvjv193ttrgqj47nh5mdt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6aor2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuhfuk3758d1gmc21sndnsh6o4b1oam07s93sm7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6aor2c9h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkiu6j5mb9941iganvpcq9iccch14nmhmaul6ngo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h6aor2c9h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: 4Patriots
subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of cris
# Outrage Over Survival Food
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9egkmp4a8vq0g5suju90crg479rirov1d3cimog_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z338mdssedg0i3c4hasa4frn0ffqj0aubrreb5r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7b3r3pv5k23406bjv6fkrgtktjhp99tnsm9ptf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5bactgieadf0rqc41gj407fo3op039hgo4u3iho_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlv2n4atmrq07vvu6imakcmt27kq5m7s7csbfc4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z45adbd5posrh77o5e056evc5dijnt3arcsvbnh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs) **You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8fbmfp6dds01oaeh63hu3s3crdk8gr1svn880t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkiinuvji78in7upl55qa4iv1iimqfhdi7beg4eo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1rmcm29pb7tj6c29dtogridnp7o25hist9n2too_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4s2bqjjkt12e6sjhda72t8fll6v38qdd9cbni70_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zuu0649eu29c739799et355si7llgimfah6f5gto_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It’s a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zevpudcktuu30n2fg3u5eetqo5pif001m1ms4no8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h2bs)**

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrc1cmsp8gbrl2jrsjq53n72b97a2nmjuk11uopg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9h66pb2c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: They're also going to give you their Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF Your Next Purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling. Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan. Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still return triple your purchase amount. That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It’s a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, . 1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

body:
I’m confident that Tennesseans are ready for a new day. And I know that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less traveled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36164641/307259797/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&emci=aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12740612) | _You’re receiving this email because you have supported exciting Democratic changemakers in the past. JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running for governor to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. JB would love to have your support, but if you would rather not hear from us you can[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&id=114380650) at any time._
* * *
Some folks might look at our campaign and wonder if we have what it takes to overcome the GOP establishment and flip Tennessee blue. I’m confident that Tennesseans are ready for a new day. And I know that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less traveled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. [**I hope you’ll come along with us on this campaign. Will you let us know here if you’d like to continue receiving email communications from me and my team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36164642/307259798/-1437197432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&emci=aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12740612) [KEEP ME IN THE LOOP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36164643/307259799/-1437197432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&emci=aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12740612) **The way I see it, there are politicians and then there are public servants.** While our communities are suffering under the brunt of the COVID-19 pandemic, our _politicians_ are arguing against common-sense public health measures like mask mandates. While kids in our streets are living through the daily trauma of gun violence, our _politicians_ are passing laws that would put more guns in our communities. While Tennessee families are struggling to afford food, rent, and healthcare, our _politicians_ are busy catering to their wealthy friends and corporations. As a _public servant_ , I look around at the community I serve – the very same community that raised me – I see folks ready for a change, ready for a leader who will fight for them. [**But I can’t do this alone, so I hope you will stay in touch with my campaign. Please add your name here to get on the list for our most critical campaign updates.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36164644/307259800/-1437197432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&emci=aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12740612) [CLICK HERE FOR UPDATES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36164645/307259801/-1437197432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&emci=aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12740612) And please note that you can opt-out at any time and [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/aacadf28-6215-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/8e563a7b-de1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU2M2E3Yi1kZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhUehfzrqu8hFWelol_AjDxv6Mdc06YzT_WkpUCQHa4=&id=114380650). Thanks for staying engaged! The progress we want to see requires full participation from us all, so I will need your support every step of the way. Onward! name: Protect our Senate Majority
subject: It's going to take all of us to defend our Democratic Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
We need your help | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miQQMO9gtXDncFEeWBEIts3kGKmLgT1kjkPnK-Y4qF3qIj58msIDoMPBuhDym3QDnCbe81HWvVRFNrvHuP3zFa3xKGIpdmqMZstQ9Rel8anTX8qfyI6fQsVL13FgXp6oMZmCW10e4wbhTS7BeVWSanOcKNEkuLM8q5tQza79OfpircMWpOVwVC1oAJYRh6ZvgScn_ISeV4Hohx5G7xQDLY7OV_ANSmZE0PzsVXkAYPLk3QNeIZiPApjlD91RRkdzjk_GwZDgKWfSfeXIt8WJTMOUHFpLKJGRPDTIwoXL9Pf8yH-7FlifgB-Q5Rz2x83tt5LQ6Gt9FjpgdNTK7Gbui7V6AUZVsVd9DXFn2Dd_9Rmq09al-BGgXDV0LwDowzHVZR/3fi/Y6yFfSkeSRCGvUl7Jj5wlg/h0/XUBCDBk-ZicbvPTm1k4wVqtV8sqaYI_SVmY1ZNTERDQ)
Derek: since Democrats won control of the Senate, we’ve taken huge steps to speed up vaccinations, get the economy moving, and protect the future of the planet. **But we have a major problem.**

With Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans only need to flip _one_ seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell – which means our entire agenda depends on not losing a _single_ Democratic seat. That's why we’re writing to you today.

**_CNN_ just named Catherine Cortez Masto (NV), Maggie Hassan (NH), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Rev. Raphael Warnock (GA) the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for reelection. We need to do everything we can to win these races, so we’re personally asking: [will you split $15 or more among these vulnerable senators and Common Good VA right now – anything you can spare before midnight tonight – to help us hold these seats and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miQQMO9gtXDncFEeWBEIts3kGKmLgT1kjkPnK-Y4qF3qIIk15-jmAQ0KV6WFV2X_iNMgqfiPTIC7A_ppHmpKTFe2xieoVG2WwS_gR1uU43GxnGxboKuHoBc9MPt3h7a9DTG5FbrxxD_gKRZMKmHa_WSa8zLFPYa7_Uw1_2SoEdG2ZkdLXrFAiUmvDpQCIpkZnlhsuPxgzJ7AcVUPH26XkspoE4VNDjI_w9OEK2wFhdjjC5Pph39s5X9G6saLrHDGQJjM_A_InxGhXlSRnXQ2kec_2J7cE3t1nKu1jyxDqAJ5CO249ZH42-jD0tBks7ofdHdJx4QXlGzUHs6klbuwBcUcMVR5bS4xF_D6tiSdiTl6b-tCcrB_9thVWFoCAzcauETSBLGcGFhuSTGovLboYOUw/3fi/Y6yFfSkeSRCGvUl7Jj5wlg/h1/qC5XgkIQu0elROnaPK3q9HtSZ76Ixg57KBYuKyBT9K4)**

When we took back the Senate in January, Democrats made a promise to fight for everyday people, and so far, we're delivering on that promise. We're fighting to make historic investments in everything from health care to infrastructure – and Catherine, Maggie, Mark and Raphael have been leading the charge in the Senate. We know they're the strong leaders we need to rebuild in the wake of this pandemic, but they need our help.

**Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ reported that Republicans started out _favored_ to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell – and with the GOP already spending MILLIONS in these battleground states, we don't have a minute to waste.**

**[So please, Derek: will you split a donation before our critical midnight deadline so we can keep these four critical seats and defend our Democratic Senate majority? clean_body: We need your help | | | Derek: since Democrats won control of the Senate, we’ve taken huge steps to speed up vaccinations, get the economy moving, and protect the future of the planet. But we have a major problem. With Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell – which means our entire agenda depends on not losing a single Democratic seat. That's why we’re writing to you today. CNN just named Catherine Cortez Masto (NV), Maggie Hassan (NH), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Rev. Raphael Warnock (GA) the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for reelection. We need to do everything we can to win these races, so we’re personally asking: When we took back the Senate in January, Democrats made a promise to fight for everyday people, and so far, we're delivering on that promise. We're fighting to make historic investments in everything from health care to infrastructure – and Catherine, Maggie, Mark and Raphael have been leading the charge in the Senate. We know they're the strong leaders we need to rebuild in the wake of this pandemic, but they need our help. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reported that Republicans started out favored to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell – and with the GOP already spending MILLIONS in these battleground states, we don't have a minute to waste. We can’t win without your support. Thank you for pitching in. – Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Casey Wardynski
subject: This makes my blood boil, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a43b46c925d21eda/9d5cbc2ce0868c35c3d6b838967d376c/36963) Peter, I’m outraged by the recent revelations about Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley. I witnessed the same disloyalty from Milley when I served in the Pentagon. I saw him engage in a pattern of behavior that overstepped his authority and undermined potential commands from the commander-in-chief. That is why I’m speaking out. In this Fox News interview, I recall how Milley and his subordinates often made statements implying they were in charge – NOT President Trump. [**Tap or click here to read more about my views on Milley’s betrayal on Foxnews.com >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a43b46c925d21eda/6a7babbabf11f629c3d6b838967d376c/36963) **Milley betrayed President Trump and America late last year by secretly assuring the Chinese Communists that the United States would not attack China.** **And he even told the head of the Chinese military that if Trump did order an attack, he would give him a heads up.** Peter, I served alongside Milley as a Colonel in the U.S. Army and during my time as Assistant Secretary of the Army. This behavior is highly inappropriate at best, and it represents everything that is wrong with senior military leadership today. Peter, it’s past time for President Biden to fire General Milley, but I doubt he will. After all, Biden’s record on foreign policy and national security is a DISASTER. His gross mismanagement of the Afghanistan withdrawal is the worst national humiliation in living memory. Our country just can’t take another two years of an unchecked Biden White House that abandons Americans abroad and allows a rogue general to betray Americans at home. Thank you for your vital support, Casey Wardynski P.S. Peter I hope you’ll take a moment to **[check out my Foxnews.com interview](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a43b46c925d21eda/6935d05051f81c2cc3d6b838967d376c/36963)** to learn more about Milley’s misconduct.Thanks again! | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a43b46c925d21eda/a1907af0763917ebc3d6b838967d376c/36963)

| | Derek, Virginians started voting this weekend and I’m fired up to see democracy in action.

But I urgently need your help right now — and here’s why:

Last week, we learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us because he wrote himself huge checks to the tune of 4 million dollars. Plus, poll after poll shows this race is neck and neck.

We have just six weeks left in this election — if our grassroots team can’t match Glenn Youngkin’s self-funding, we’ll lose all our momentum at the worst possible time. Donald Trump will get a huge win at Virginia’s expense.

That’s why I’m announcing my campaign’s goal of raising $2 million online in the month of September — and to kick us off, **I want us to raise $150,000 in the next 48 hours.**

_**[So Derek, will you chip in $25 to help us get a head start? clean_body: We need to raise $2 million to win | | | = | | Derek, Virginians started voting this weekend and I’m fired up to see democracy in action. But I urgently need your help right now — and here’s why: Last week, we learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us because he wrote himself huge checks to the tune of 4 million dollars. Plus, poll after poll shows this race is neck and neck. We have just six weeks left in this election — if our grassroots team can’t match Glenn Youngkin’s self-funding, we’ll lose all our momentum at the worst possible time. Donald Trump will get a huge win at Virginia’s expense. That’s why I’m announcing my campaign’s goal of raising $2 million online in the month of September — and to kick us off, I want us to raise $150,000 in the next 48 hours. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The good news is we’re actually already over halfway to $2 million this month. But the bad news is that time is not on our side. Now that Virginians are already voting, we need to treat every single day like it’s Election Day — because it is. = Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: CNN has rated these four seats as the most likely to flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi friends, In 2016, I won one of the closest Senate races in history by only 1,017 votes. Now I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection next year. CNN has rated my seat along with those of Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and Rev. Raphael Warnock in Georgia, as the four Democratic seats most likely to flip in 2022. **Senate Republicans are already spending millions against us, and there are millions more on the way as part of their plan to take back the Senate.** Thanks to our Democratic majority, we've been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan, helping to curb the pandemic, provide economic relief to the American people, and lower health care costs. But all of our progress will be lost if Republicans succeed in flipping the Senate. I've been honored to work with my colleagues in the Senate to advance our Democratic priorities. But there's still so much left to do. We need to keep the Senate blue to continue our work on critical issues like protecting reproductive freedom, ensuring that every eligible voter can vote, and addressing the climate crisis. **[With control of the Senate hinging on these four races and our huge end-of-quarter FEC deadline just around the corner, we simply can't afford to fall short. That's why I'm personally asking: will you split a donation between my campaign and Senator Warnock's in Georgia, Senator Kelly's in Arizona, and Senator Cortez Masto’s in Nevada before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36171774/307286673/-149339129?refcode=e20210921_core4-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzZkMjgwOS1lOTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itYzTR-_Kj_ejhuzCOqZEXhB-lt6XbYCPFK2xJ_OJZE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36171778/307286680/-149339129?refcode=e20210921_core4-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzZkMjgwOS1lOTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itYzTR-_Kj_ejhuzCOqZEXhB-lt6XbYCPFK2xJ_OJZE=)

We're counting on your grassroots support to fight back against right-wing attacks and stand up to the GOP's deep pockets.
**[With the future of our majority on the line, your support could not be more important. Please split a donation to hold onto these critical seats and protect the future of the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36171782/307286685/-149339129?refcode=e20210921_core4-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzZkMjgwOS1lOTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itYzTR-_Kj_ejhuzCOqZEXhB-lt6XbYCPFK2xJ_OJZE=)**

But all of our progress will be lost if Republicans succeed in flipping the Senate. I've been honored to work with my colleagues in the Senate to advance our Democratic priorities. But there's still so much left to do. We need to keep the Senate blue to continue our work on critical issues like protecting reproductive freedom, ensuring that every eligible voter can vote, and addressing the climate crisis. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = With your help, we flipped the Senate – making it possible to pass historic COVID-19 relief, help struggling families and small businesses, and expand access to health care. But if Republicans retake control, they could erase all our progress. There is so much at stake in this election, and if we don't commit early to protecting our Senate majority, we could lose it. We're counting on your grassroots support to fight back against right-wing attacks and stand up to the GOP's deep pockets. = Thank you for your support – it means the world to me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: American Liberty Fund
subject: Urgent: our country can’t take two more years of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
Our country can’t take two more years of Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden Democrats controlling the majority in the U.S. House of Repre
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znqtlg1ut9cone2ovvbeqhifas0ghsilgas73pco_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9j62pr4c5h2bs)
Fellow Patriot,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z248ht6qr0376i0hou5tahf7q3le8fugtoh1lbtg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9j62pr4c5h2bs) Our country can’t take two more years of Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden Democrats controlling the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.

You and I know their radical **Destroy America agenda** is an absolute disaster!

[**That’s why I ask you to give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more right now to help elect patriots who are proven fighters to Congress.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvqkqmkue86hteqh62d21nul3b9hcuhi1bjk1dmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9j62pr4c5h2bs)

You and I know our country is in grave danger.

We feel it in our bones.

Our fellow Americans have been abandoned in Afghanistan...

...our bedrock American values are under attack every day here at home...

...and while our families, friends, and freedoms are getting _hammered_ , standard issue RINOs do _nothing_.

You see, a Republican majority isn’t enough. You and I urgently need Republicans with guts in that majority.

**That’s where American Liberty Fund comes in.**

I’m Shane Cory, U.S. Marine Corps veteran and the founder of American Liberty Fund.

Retired Congressman Bob Barr – who led the fight to throw crooked Bill Clinton out of the White House – is our chairman.

**American Liberty Fund is a political action committee with a big difference. We raise urgently needed funds _only_ for patriotic candidates who _fight_.**

Candidates like Representative Lauren Boebert from Colorado, who we helped get elected in the last election cycle.

Country club Republicans and GOP jellyfish don’t get a penny.

You see, the Marine Corps taught me to fight bad guys like a rabid wolverine. My years in political campaigns have reinforced that same hard lesson.

And right now, you and I are in the fight of our lives.

**So American Liberty Fund has the hit ground running to recruit, support, and elect solid candidates to the U.S. House in 2022. We’re backing Afghanistan combat veterans John Castorani, Joe Kent, and Alek Scarlatos.**

John Castorani is an Army Special Operations and Intelligence veteran who hunted down the terrorists who attacked the diplomatic compound in Benghazi, Libya. He’s running in Virginia’s 7th Congressional district.

Joe Kent is an Army Ranger and Special Forces veteran with 11 combat deployments. He’s running in Washington’s 3rd Congressional district.

Alek Scarlatos is an Oregon National Guard infantry veteran. (You’ve seen him on TV and in the news – with four other men, he stopped a deadly terrorist attack on a train to Paris in 2015. Clint Eastwood even made a movie about it.) He’s running in Oregon’s 4th Congressional district.

**Each of these American Liberty Fund candidates has put his life on the line for you, me, our families, and our country.**

With your crucial help, American Liberty Fund will help them and other candidates record hard-hitting, voter outreach videos that will reach independent and conservative voters throughout their Congressional districts.

We’ll help fully fund their grassroots races, so they can block walk, door knock, call, email, and text voters, inspire them to become supporters, and turn them out on Election Day.

Each vote, each second, and each dollar counts.

[**Patriot,

Please help get these candidates to Congress with your vitally urgent gift of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0i212i5k7in7b7i3ga2neb8raavhtvqf475f3o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9j62pr4c5h2bs)

Proven fighters are worth their weight in gold...especially in dangerous times like ours.

[**So your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford right now is absolutely essential.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgfomf7hdvm99uupcghbbm4fkqe88nj61up72b40_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c9j62pr4c5h2bs)

Let’s get these candidates to victory.

Don’t delay!

Sincerely,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

Paid for by American Liberty Fund

Contributions are not tax deductible. American Liberty Fund is organized as a Super PAC and as such, contributions limits and corporate donation restriction do not apply. name: Team Nikki
subject: Ron DeSantis was in Texas
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

It seems like Ron DeSantis has been a lot more concerned with Texas than Florida recently.

First, he said he’ll “have a look” at a Texas-style abortion ban in Florida after Texas passed the country’s most extreme anti-choice legislation.

Then, he travelled to Texas yesterday to raise money from major Republican donors, once again putting his Presidential ambitions before Floridians.

We deserve better than an anti-choice Governor who’s far more concerned with running for President than leading Florida in times of crisis. If you’re with us on this, click here to chip in now and help
Nikki defeat DeSantis next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-texas-desantissept]

DeSantis’ failed leadership is nothing new—but the stakes couldn’t be higher.

Floridians need a Governor who will lead us in times of crisis and stand up for our rights. Instead, Ron DeSantis is raising money in Texas and following their lead on anti-choice legislation.

Friend, we can’t wait until next year to fight back. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to chip in now and help Nikki win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-texas-desantissept]

—Team Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

name: Peter Franchot
subject: This historic moment in context
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
The COVID-19 pandemic will go down in history as one of the most consequential periods of our lifetimes. To rise to the urgency of this historic moment, we need bolder action from state government than we’ve seen in more than a generation.
It is not enough to return to a status-quo that has failed far too many of our fellow citizens -- because as we’ve seen in clear and vivid detail over the past year and a half, this crisis has only exposed and exacerbated the many existing inequities in our society across areas like healthcare, housing, and education.
If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’m going to take the bold action needed to truly lift our communities into the quality of life they deserve. I have a plan to create 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future. I’m going to kickstart our economic growth by building statewide transit. I’m going to take on climate change by putting Maryland on the path to becoming the first net zero state in the nation. And I’ll institute a concrete plan for economic, social and political equity to finally level the playing field for Black Marylanders.
But here’s the truth: this vision for our future will only be possible with your help. I’m humbly asking for your support today to help me win this competitive election, so that we can secure a better and stronger future for all of Maryland’s diverse communities.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021]As your long-time Comptroller, I’ve been guided by a core desire to invest our state’s resources in you. Over my tenure, I transformed the Maryland Comptroller’s Office from a sleepy bureaucracy into a national model of customer service and efficiency. I fully intend to do the same thing for the Governor’s Office.
I will focus my brand of proven, honest leadership on delivering results that you can see and feel every day. As your next Governor, I’ll make sure that state government once again gets the basics right for our working families -- including filling potholes on state roads, picking up trash, and answering the phones quickly with a friendly operator who’s there to help.
With your support, we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022, and deliver on the concrete points of progress to raise the quality of life for all Marylanders. No matter large or small, any amount you can contribute will go a long way in the fight to secure a better and stronger future for Maryland’s communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/historicmoment2021?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I've had it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I’ve had it. I watched Trump threaten to run for President if Republicans retake the House. I watched Republican donors rush $86 MILLION to fund their scheme to do it. I watched them launch 400+ voter suppression bills to cheat the system and prevent Democrats from ever winning again. **[Now, I’m going to watch Republicans’ ploy completely BACKFIRE.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36173319/307293421/1694321165?refcode=20210921_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzFiZGI5OS1lYzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKgtAsBxdvsbZcn9nSPyJxii9MGY2bNVBMkpvT6-q_E=)** **_[Here’s my plan: If 759 Democrats rush $15 before midnight, we’ll ECLIPSE Trump and Republicans' big plans of regaining power -- with a HISTORIC Democratic fundraising surge to defeat them. * * *
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|
> MAGA Lead Warrior, Governor Eric Greitens To Vote Against Mitch McConnell as GOP Senate Leader Once Elected
---
| On Steve Bannon's War Room, US Senate Candidate & former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens announced that once elected to the Senate he would vote against Sen. Mitch McConnell as GOP Senate Leader. Governor Greitens is the first prominent GOP Senate candidate of the 2022 cycle to take this leading position.
Governor Greitens stated the following:
"President Donald J. Trump proved to the Republican Party that the only way to meaningfully advance conservative policy is through strong, uncompromising leadership. That's why as a Republican running for Missouri's open U.S. Senate seat, I am committed to finding new leadership in the Senate when Republicans win back the majority in 2022. We have sadly watched Mitch McConnell morph from a conservative fighter into the power- merchant of D.C., prioritizing special interests and personal influence over America. Now he is actively engaged in working against President Trump and the MAGA movement as we chart our path back to the majority--seemingly unaware why he even has his job in the first place.
As a Navy SEAL and Governor, I recognize that people are sick of the weak, woke RINOs. President Trump had one of the most consequential administrations in the history of the Republic. Now, just imagine what we would have accomplished if we had an America First House and Senate."
[According to President Trump's pollster, ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kidBiU4vRma13xZNs7_q0VVHKpegG6_GrAl8ZPirW9ZLC-0ZqLLsW9qdfoeNY8wMEUiNz_aYYbzd1L-KfSpBEsH4lwuZipz37nbtryit5451WTSSk2fubFIekII8Vx6SDfTwY5sosnSllr4tywsr7i_qhjf8hPQVZvD6OXangYVYNts753C1aplXK7FcbYgDHCtg2GYrvUn0s3E14nlxQj_CbRi4GNk6MXk-QGQJV4jiYclo0tjGClz6jO1resndcpbTKVNp3jo=&c=N_z6MWbgr_gXS09yXsXjMRo1_LA8FFnFHV-E6PGB1aJxWeQ5f3AqxA==&ch=XLPpsvXZ1b9TUvw2rzwLlLUTzbDSQhnSr0-aVU-qZ9oT3lMpKbu23w==)Governor Greitens holds a nearly 40 point lead in the Missouri GOP Senate primary. The poll found Greitens enjoys support from 55 percent of those who view Trump favorably. ####

| Peter,

| Critical Race Theory is a poison that has NO PLACE in our schools, in our military, or anywhere else in the country for that matter...
School boards are actively pushing to indoctrinate our children with this nonsense, and disgraced general and attempted coup leader Mark Milley even wants America's heroes to be forced to read up on CRT!
Dividing Americans along racial lines was despicable in the past, and it's just as despicable now...[let's stop their Marxist ideology dead in its tracks!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7qaS2BzOiPMT3DYl4z-LLnTI7KJ0DKEvhytdOu_SyEpIFXwPOhiCWMsPPHwW37FLx9Ci6zP4TgQhSQzzg2F4_60H6CNDJIM-PrgWStc5oGdiuPtyPYXC_g-U-B-3tpqLwmQttvvMonCQZkHyg7guYNMBzcXUjKx5qJU8dl5IsriNpW5Gru1QA==&c=zWhsAZn9T__JQ99eMfFtRcKe00vVNcPUPcizwje1bLCE3Eempa_ubQ==&ch=IrtVLk-DmxhThoXk47ZkxUa2rSxyWlDTa6YZVHL9K_5t1N-7cAd7FA==)

name: Team Mondaire
subject: This end-of-quarter goal won’t look like previous goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

The FEC end of quarter is upon us in just a few days, and we’ve set a goal of raising $20,000 — our biggest goal yet.
**[We’ll explain in just a minute why this goal looks different than previous ones, but first, if you are able to make a contribution, you can do that here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36175887/307303485/451935881?refcode2=5e2d3c17-f31a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210921-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJkM2MxNy1mMzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4Ko3mixDd-Kcm95PdAIicGgCRqjPhiR-YelCapxBE8=)**
By now, you’re likely aware that the first draft of the 2022 Congressional map was drawn up — and it showed our district getting much, much more competitive.
If that first draft is implemented, the door will be open for both Democratic AND Republican challengers to jump in this race against Mondaire. It’s absolutely necessary that we are ready to compete no matter what the map looks like, and the only way we will be able to do that is if we have the resources to conduct robust advertising and voter outreach programs.
That’s where you come in. Please, if you can:
**[Click here to make a contribution to help us hit our $20,000 end-of-quarter goal before our federally mandated reporting deadline. Any amount you can give will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36175888/307303486/451935881?refcode2=5e2d3c17-f31a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210921-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJkM2MxNy1mMzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4Ko3mixDd-Kcm95PdAIicGgCRqjPhiR-YelCapxBE8=)**
This is an ambitious goal, but if we hit it, FEC reports will reflect that we have tons of support from all across this district, and that will send an important message to any future challengers. That’s why your support is so crucial right now.
Thank you for reading,
Team Mondaire

name: Team Cheri Beasley
subject: $1,439,301 vs. $3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We know this is what it takes to win because this is how Democrats defeated Donald Trump last year
#

**$1,439,301**
This is how much Club for Growth Action, a far-right super PAC, dumped into our race. They’re spending this on TV and digital ads to prop up Ted Budd, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate.
**$250,000**
That’s what Ted Budd pumped into his campaign just last quarter — during his first quarter in this race. He’s known for writing checks to his campaigns, and there’s no telling how much of his own money he’s willing to spend to buy this seat for himself.
**$3**
This is what we’re asking you to donate today. It may not seem like $3 is enough to compete with Republicans’ big money, but when everybody gives, it adds up in powerful ways.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to our campaign today to elect Cheri Beasley and stop Republicans from buying North Carolina’s Senate seat? We’re counting on lots and lots of people like you to make sure we have the resources required to win this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36176064/307304339/1741212721?refcode2=4af005e3-f31a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210921-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWYwMDVlMy1mMzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhCdIntYp60yDYEKgARQNGgqAZdmIdi5NiBi7KLAcvo=)
After the FEC deadline in a few weeks, we’ll find out how much more money Republicans have dropped into this race. So it’s important that we demonstrate that their special interests and dark money are no match for our people-powered campaign.
Thank you!
\- Team Beasley

clean_body: We know this is what it takes to win because this is how Democrats defeated Donald Trump last year $1,439,301 This is how much Club for Growth Action, a far-right super PAC, dumped into our race. They’re spending this on TV and digital ads to prop up Ted Budd, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate. $250,000 That’s what Ted Budd pumped into his campaign just last quarter — during his first quarter in this race. He’s known for writing checks to his campaigns, and there’s no telling how much of his own money he’s willing to spend to buy this seat for himself. $3 This is what we’re asking you to donate today. It may not seem like $3 is enough to compete with Republicans’ big money, but when everybody gives, it adds up in powerful ways. = After the FEC deadline in a few weeks, we’ll find out how much more money Republicans have dropped into this race. So it’s important that we demonstrate that their special interests and dark money are no match for our people-powered campaign.
