clean_body: | | | BREAKING : A 6th Republican opponent vying to unseat Governor Steve Sisolak JUST ANNOUNCED... | Derek -- A familiar face is considering a comeback to the Silver State and to that, we say no thank you. During his time as Nevada’s U.S. Senator, he bowed down to Donald Trump -- and was kicked out of office by Nevadans because of his close allegiance to Trump. So what makes him think 2022 will be different this time around? Derek, Dean Heller thinks we’ve forgotten about his Trump cronyism. But we haven’t. That’s why it’s essential we keep Steve in office and ensure Nevada remains blue in 2022. Look, Steve is Nevada’s first Democratic governor in 20 years. Republicans are willing to do just about anything to roll back the progress we’ve made. In the Senate, Dean Heller repeatedly led the fight to dismantle the Affordable Care Act that would’ve left working families across the country without anywhere to turn. As Governor, Steve Sisolak has built on the success of the Affordable Care Act by passing a public health insurance option that ensures Nevadans have access to affordable health care and revitalizes our hospital infrastructure amidst the COVID-19 pandemic. Derek, it’s essential that we re-elect Steve Sisolak if we want to maintain the progress we’ve made -- not just in Nevada, but across the nation. Thank you, Team Sisolak Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
Let’s take action. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193193/307358615/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQwN2NhOS0xYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYrQS7pupairCy4RF9MaEkgn2mJYIVii9apxCAhRpfg=&emci=00764f7e-ea1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=78d07ca9-1a1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12666102)

| | Peter,

In 2014, after the passage of the Affordable Care Act, Colorado expanded Medicaid.

Medicaid expansion brought health care coverage to nearly half a million Coloradans. **[Now, it’s time for Congress to do the same for the rest of the country. Add your name to demand Congress expand Medicaid nationally and bring health care coverage to millions of Americans >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193194/307358643/-1242484417?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQwN2NhOS0xYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYrQS7pupairCy4RF9MaEkgn2mJYIVii9apxCAhRpfg=&emci=00764f7e-ea1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=78d07ca9-1a1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12666102)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193195/307358644/-1242484417?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQwN2NhOS0xYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYrQS7pupairCy4RF9MaEkgn2mJYIVii9apxCAhRpfg=&emci=00764f7e-ea1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=78d07ca9-1a1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12666102)**
---
The Colorado Health Institute called Colorado’s drop in uninsured rates “one of the biggest success stories from the ACA.”

Unfortunately, not every state has had the same experience. In 12 states, Republican-controlled legislatures chose not to expand Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans uninsured.

**As a pediatrician, it breaks my heart to know so many families are living without access to health care — especially during one of the worst public health crises in our nation’s history.**

But Congress has the chance to change that. Medicaid expansion is in the Democrats’ reconciliation package — meaning it could be passed by Congress as soon as this month.

**[Join me and demand Congress pass Medicaid expansion to bring health care to millions of uninsured Americans. I need 30 more signatures from FL by midnight. Add your name >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193196/307358645/-1242484417?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQwN2NhOS0xYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYrQS7pupairCy4RF9MaEkgn2mJYIVii9apxCAhRpfg=&emci=00764f7e-ea1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=78d07ca9-1a1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12666102)**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193197/307358646/-1242484417?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQwN2NhOS0xYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYrQS7pupairCy4RF9MaEkgn2mJYIVii9apxCAhRpfg=&emci=00764f7e-ea1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=78d07ca9-1a1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12666102)**

Thank you,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo
| **Dr. Yadira Caraveo** is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. clean_body: Let’s take action. | | Peter, In 2014, after the passage of the Affordable Care Act, Colorado expanded Medicaid. Medicaid expansion brought health care coverage to nearly half a million Coloradans. | The Colorado Health Institute called Colorado’s drop in uninsured rates “one of the biggest success stories from the ACA.” Unfortunately, not every state has had the same experience. In 12 states, Republican-controlled legislatures chose not to expand Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans uninsured. As a pediatrician, it breaks my heart to know so many families are living without access to health care — especially during one of the worst public health crises in our nation’s history. But Congress has the chance to change that. Medicaid expansion is in the Democrats’ reconciliation package — meaning it could be passed by Congress as soon as this month. Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along:** | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Open for a quick Q&A; with me! | Hi there! I reached out the other day to ask if you had any questions for me about John or our family, and I’m so thankful that so many of you reached out! Here are just a couple of questions, and I wanted to share the answers with all of you — but first of all, can you **_[chip in to support John’s campaign for governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193822/307360414/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&mc=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjNWJjYi0xYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmAjenS8eo145lrwrTgnOLRv6Gwrfnq72Km7mxGDVLo=)_** He’ll be the kind of leader Ohio’s hardworking families deserve. **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193823/307360415/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&mc=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjNWJjYi0xYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmAjenS8eo145lrwrTgnOLRv6Gwrfnq72Km7mxGDVLo=)**
* * *
**Q &A with Dena Cranley** **_Question from Brian: “Besides mayor, what other local positions has John [held]?”_** Answer: John started out in public service as a member of the Cincinnati City Council from 2000 - 2009. He served on numerous committees, including as chairman of the Finance Committee, where he created Cincycare, a program aimed at expanding health care access among working people.

During his time on the Council, John also helped found Ohio’s chapter of the Innocence Project, which has helped exonerate and free 33 wrongfully-convicted people.
**_Question from Irene: “What has [John] accomplished for Cincinnati? What is he hoping to accomplish as governor?”_** Answer: John has done so much for our city! I really couldn’t be prouder of the way he’s led Cincinnati’s comeback — and that’s just what he’ll do as governor.

John became mayor in 2013, and since then, Cincinnati has seen unprecedented economic and cultural revitalization. John spearheaded historic, much-needed police reform for the city, and under his leadership, we’ve seen significant poverty reduction.

But it doesn’t stop there. John’s also overseeing the construction of the largest city solar farm in the country — it’ll help power Cincinnati while prioritizing protecting our environment. After the solar farm is online, city government services will be effectively carbon neutral.
* * *
I may be a _little_ biased, but I hope that this quick Q&A gives you even more insight into just why John is the right choice to lead our state. **_[If you’re ready to elect John and write a comeback story for Ohio, consider giving $10, $20, or any amount that works for you John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36193835/307360426/-1406512299?refcode=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ms=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&mc=ea.9f7c5bcb-1c1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjNWJjYi0xYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmAjenS8eo145lrwrTgnOLRv6Gwrfnq72Km7mxGDVLo=)

clean_body: Open for a quick Q&A; with me! | Hi there! I reached out the other day to ask if you had any questions for me about John or our family, and I’m so thankful that so many of you reached out! Here are just a couple of questions, and I wanted to share the answers with all of you — but first of all, can you = He’ll be the kind of leader Ohio’s hardworking families deserve. = Q &A with Dena Cranley Question from Brian: “Besides mayor, what other local positions has John [held]?” Answer: John started out in public service as a member of the Cincinnati City Council from 2000 - 2009. He served on numerous committees, including as chairman of the Finance Committee, where he created Cincycare, a program aimed at expanding health care access among working people. During his time on the Council, John also helped found Ohio’s chapter of the Innocence Project, which has helped exonerate and free 33 wrongfully-convicted people. Question from Irene: “What has [John] accomplished for Cincinnati? What is he hoping to accomplish as governor?” Answer: John has done so much for our city! I really couldn’t be prouder of the way he’s led Cincinnati’s comeback — and that’s just what he’ll do as governor. John became mayor in 2013, and since then, Cincinnati has seen unprecedented economic and cultural revitalization. John spearheaded historic, much-needed police reform for the city, and under his leadership, we’ve seen significant poverty reduction. But it doesn’t stop there. John’s also overseeing the construction of the largest city solar farm in the country — it’ll help power Cincinnati while prioritizing protecting our environment. After the solar farm is online, city government services will be effectively carbon neutral. I may be a little biased, but I hope that this quick Q&A gives you even more insight into just why John is the right choice to lead our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = If you have any other questions about John, me, or our family, please feel free to send them to me. Have a great day! Dena = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = =_ Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

Now, after seven years as an elementary school teacher, I have the privilege and responsibility to advocate for every student and every educator in Virginia as an elected Representative. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36194002/307360949/714510717?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210921fowler_EEE_180DO_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4YTkxMDY1LTFkMWItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7NLjJChON75kvZ0ZwUrNRNnQQiHmT0ax148pNKJaYUE=)

Educators & allies, When I was a little kid, I felt like my teachers saw a spark in me. When I became a teacher, one of my biggest priorities was to ensure all my students knew that I saw the spark in them. Now, after seven years as an elementary school teacher, I have the privilege and responsibility to advocate for every student and every educator in Virginia as an elected Representative. These days, instead of spending every day with twenty-something 3rd graders, I spend every day thinking about over 1 million students and about 100,000 educators. And then I go fight for them, for the funding schools need to succeed, the space educators need to thrive, and the support students need to grow and excel. **Over the next 45 days, I’m fighting to keep my job. Anti-public education forces are mobilized in Virginia, and they hope that defeating me and my educator colleagues will be their spark to a nationwide takeover of our schools. My friends, with your help, we’re not going to let that happen.** [_**Can you split a donation now between my campaign and Elect Educators so we can fight back and protect the spark in every student?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36194003/307360950/714510717?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210921fowler_EEE_180DO_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4YTkxMDY1LTFkMWItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7NLjJChON75kvZ0ZwUrNRNnQQiHmT0ax148pNKJaYUE=) Our fight is about so much more than academics. You know that public education is the foundation of our society. Public schools are where our children learn not only to read and write, but also social and life skills. Our public schools serve all of our communities regardless of their economic or social status, and they shape the future of our community and society. School is often a safe haven for our children to not only learn, but to socialize, have stability, and sometimes even just have a decent meal. **There is no substitute for real, lived experience when the decisions are made about what students, parents, and educators need to succeed.[_And there’s no substitute for the financial support candidates like me need to win. Thanks for your support,
Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler

P.S. | | Dear Friend, Florida’s very own Governor, Ron DeSantis, has begun sweeping reform in our state to better protect and fund our police. It’s a brave move that will benefit our local communities! **But the Radical Left in D.C. has other plans to defund the police and keep our borders wide open. ** **We need to stand with Governor DeSantis and his decision to **[**support our police**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=629e2bd49e&e=c2296cffff)**[](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=1625ad28a4&e=c2296cffff) against defunding!**
---
| [HELP AMANDA BACK THE BLUE](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4b5610174e&e=c2296cffff "HELP AMANDA BACK THE BLUE")

| **Our officers risk their lives every day to protect Florida, it is only right that we do the same and protect them!** We see the chaos and lawlessness of Democrat-controlled cities across the country; Governor DeSantis and Amanda Makki refuse to let that happen to our state! Well-funded police create safer, stronger communities for Florida. **As conservatives, we will not let our towns or cities' crime be like Chicago, San Francisco, or Portland!** The left’s ignorant anti-police agenda is not the standard to be set in Washington. The halls of Congress need leaders that respect the sacrifices our officers make for our state and country. **With your support, Amanda can help conservatives retake the house in 2022 and protect our police!** [**Can Amanda count on your support and stand with America’s police?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=fedd73d615&e=c2296cffff)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: The filibuster still stands in our way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fLfj%2FrPnygUK3xa44jBo1d9r4k6mtkyL&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Across our country, Republican-led legislatures have introduced and passed more than 400 bills to suppress the vote - and Republican governors in states like Florida, Georgia, and Texas have signed them into law.
At the federal level, the Supreme Court's conservative majority dealt a death blow to the Voting Rights Act, all but green-lighting the GOP's voter suppression and rendering what was once hailed as one of the most effective pieces of legislation ever meaningless.
In the Senate, Republicans have abused the filibuster to block passage of the For The People Act, a sweeping bill that would have set national standards for voting rights and protected citizens from these state-based GOP attacks. **In an effort to compromise, Democrats have released a new voting rights bill, the Freedom to Vote Act.**
This legislation makes some concessions, but still takes bold steps to strengthen voting rights. If Senate Republicans cannot muster enough filibuster-proof support to get this bill passed into law, then they truly no longer stand on the side of democracy. And if we have elected officials who don't _stand_ with democracy, then we must do what's necessary to circumvent their obstruction and _protect_ our democracy.
**That means we must eliminate the filibuster to pass this new legislation that protects voting rights. I know you 've spoken out on this issue before, but with new legislation introduced, I'm counting on your voice again. Please submit your response now to apply grassroots pressure in the Senate:**
[Add your name to support eliminating the filibuster to protect voting rights.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721voting?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1073-su-nd)
Friend, I wish I could say I was optimistic that my Republican colleagues would join us in protecting voting rights. But remember this: Sen. John Barrasso himself has said he wants to make Joe Biden a "one-half-term president" by taking back Congressional majorities next year. His motivations right now are entirely partisan - and in McConnell's mind, if voter suppression is the pathway to a Republican majority, so be it.
The soul of the Republican Party has been lost to extremism, and the filibuster is their greatest tool to allow the minority of our nation to rule through that extremism. For the sake of our democracy, the filibuster must be eliminated.
Today, I'm asking 750 members of this team - in a massive display of grassroots activism - to speak out. We have legislation that can save voting rights right now if the filibuster were eliminated. So please, before my 11:59 p.m. deadline, make your voice heard:
**[Add your name to support eliminating the filibuster to protect voting rights.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721voting?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1073-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Sc5fmUmSkLzaMB1xOsU5Ad9r4k6mtkyL&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

clean_body: Friend, Across our country, Republican-led legislatures have introduced and passed more than 400 bills to suppress the vote - and Republican governors in states like Florida, Georgia, and Texas have signed them into law. At the federal level, the Supreme Court's conservative majority dealt a death blow to the Voting Rights Act, all but green-lighting the GOP's voter suppression and rendering what was once hailed as one of the most effective pieces of legislation ever meaningless. In the Senate, Republicans have abused the filibuster to block passage of the For The People Act, a sweeping bill that would have set national standards for voting rights and protected citizens from these state-based GOP attacks. In an effort to compromise, Democrats have released a new voting rights bill, the Freedom to Vote Act. This legislation makes some concessions, but still takes bold steps to strengthen voting rights. If Senate Republicans cannot muster enough filibuster-proof support to get this bill passed into law, then they truly no longer stand on the side of democracy. And if we have elected officials who don't stand with democracy, then we must do what's necessary to circumvent their obstruction and protect our democracy. That means we must eliminate the filibuster to pass this new legislation that protects voting rights. I know you 've spoken out on this issue before, but with new legislation introduced, I'm counting on your voice again. Friend,
---
As we finalize our campaign’s platform to defeat radical liberal Tony Evers, I want to be sure YOUR priorities are front and center.
---
**Winning this governor’s race will mean _nothing_ if we aren’t listening to grassroots conservatives like you along the way. **
---
_I’m running for governor because I want Wisconsin to once again be a state with safe neighborhoods, open schools, and well-paying jobs._
---
But right now, I want to know what matters most to YOU.
---
**[Please take my Listening to Wisconsin Survey before the submission deadline TONIGHT at 10:15 P.M. to tell me what priorities you want me to tackle as your next governor.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=7adf1d4eb1b34085b0aebccc8d8441c0&_e=eTR1fn9RqvZbYFV6xkoyQafcTSW_uJsi1OC-vLPX1BOZe77O5Wgf-95DJV7Hwt-WDZDSyORBH6G7vC05CRknZWqO4Qr5mk9gE2MOnFCamkajXCUGLeJuWwvsfhR0Yyt3SK_sBlX83M_l8jBL7my4Fz2Cc8QoDpRW_a3-qBcyi7PPhs-SxT1-bwxPW13r-B4Fr6FDfV3_5Mi1llr4F61tqzaibVhu2GPYsxZRFGlwAQ778-Vx55iBnS-9PkRYFHJLIk_cc8J0UZTNZwVMPNsFrbqEJsKFvjC8KXyrYVFtHWrLP9t6bTpbtx0E36NTwT7aUF7gnX1KcvkUVqJcczfFRDVQUp7-RfB5b0Jnplp3YioyV98AB2AWSlPaZ9VIGdP8IA7yOuVJQ8VmtSE0sCRU2khqT39Kbbx0Hfgc1mCaGdwROdeV6XuON3neGMhdpGZ4eOT5T-ai9foZGy8QKGY2yH_Yghrxb9bib0yyuI5dDr5IPSBzrUPoQZkqCw0z0OY0t0Eq9egU9vzAysdkek-neQ%3D%3D)**
---
**_Listening to Wisconsin Survey_** **Recipient: dpwillis67@gmail.com** **Status:[Pending]** **Deadline: Tonight @ 10:15 P.M.** [**BEGIN THE SURVEY >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=7adf1d4eb1b34085b0aebccc8d8441c0&_e=eTR1fn9RqvZbYFV6xkoyQafcTSW_uJsi1OC-vLPX1BOZe77O5Wgf-95DJV7Hwt-WDZDSyORBH6G7vC05CRknZWqO4Qr5mk9gE2MOnFCamkajXCUGLeJuWwvsfhR0Yyt3SK_sBlX83M_l8jBL7my4Fz2Cc8QoDpRW_a3-qBcyi7PPhs-SxT1-bwxPW13r-B4Fr6FDfV3_5Mi1llr4F61tqzaibVhu2GPYsxZRFGlwAQ778-Vx55iBnS-9PkRYFHJLIk_cc8J0UZTNZwVMPNsFrbqEJsKFvjC8KXyrYVFtHWrLP9t6bTpbtx0E36NTwT7aOD0G_gp8e3TNta5H-MW2O7MLgFXWmjuOJQLmaP2Vu-9x70wAxqDCeuUvb8YLZNrninNjbAXvv_FNeHBVEXAIxp5mPJ0PJnfiCZIqbiJ2XsSNYMjKZ2yJdcOWolIU5U7jXDhr5NN11jNWTYBcXEM6KMLedq_vuf3kJI6bCewDs_tn-bEe46hAwbSw_D-RF7j7XyI2SCv_zIhH76EjZf625A%3D%3D)
---
If the last year has taught us anything about liberal governors like Tony Evers, it’s that they don’t believe the rules apply to them.
---
And they certainly don’t bother to take YOUR priorities seriously.
---
_That’s why Evers ignored his duty to protect the people of Wisconsin when Kenosha burned at the hands of rioters last year, and it’s why he continues to keep our kids out of the classroom._
---
But unlike Tony Evers, to build our campaign’s winning platform, I’m going straight to the people.
---
**[So please, take my Listening to Wisconsin Survey before the submission deadline TONIGHT at 10:15 P.M. to tell me what priorities you want me to tackle as your next governor.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=7adf1d4eb1b34085b0aebccc8d8441c0&_e=eTR1fn9RqvZbYFV6xkoyQafcTSW_uJsi1OC-vLPX1BOZe77O5Wgf-95DJV7Hwt-WDZDSyORBH6G7vC05CRknZWqO4Qr5mk9gE2MOnFCamkajXCUGLeJuWwvsfhR0Yyt3SK_sBlX83M_l8jBL7my4Fz2Cc8QoDpRW_a3-qBcyi7PPhs-SxT1-bwxPW13r-B4Fr6FDfV3_5Mi1llr4F61tqzaibVhu2GPYsxZRFGlwAQ778-Vx55iBnS-9PkRYFHJLIk_cc8J0UZTNZwVMPNsFrbqEJsKFvjC8KXyrYVFtHWrLP9t6bTpbtx0E36NTwT7aFOvhxel3EA_Do7ulBLiA01wwKq-eeVo1D8rGkS0o--NooJr3kmAx6F7Jn_eLZbzIrlBhcpX9dP1YU6AdzHb0cZofv0MthcEoByJyzRjJZQdqFhAoocUtZEtz842Aeeu_1YkIah9i5HCdvaPnl9KkHoN-Hc4F_ldNoscniiMHtJOgqH2mlkY4XsiazTSPJAtrHDq20_sAvIFKxok-FQP-JQ%3D%3D)**
---
Thank you,
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Hey, can you give me a minute of your time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Please take a minute to fill out this survey. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36195298/307365278/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVlMTczMy0yMDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i7qC_IT4EhqCnXXQY-IfPSrqBmxWxIn2HuO4akxDQDQ=)
Hi there, I’m back in Washington after a productive time back home in Colorado. I spent time with Susan and our girls, and traveled 1,850 miles around our state across 15 counties. The folks I met made it clear that they want to see action in Washington on the issues facing our state. Already this year, we passed the American Rescue Plan which is helping us recover from the pandemic and has us on track to cut child poverty nearly in half and we’re working to pass the infrastructure package, which includes my provision for a historic federal investment in our nation’s broadband. I spent the month of August traveling the state and hearing from folks, but I didn’t get a chance to hear from you. **Will you take a minute to fill out our Official September Priorities Survey and share your thoughts? Tell me what you think we should prioritize while the Senate is back in session. ** | | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36195299/307365279/-237044217?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210921_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVlMTczMy0yMDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i7qC_IT4EhqCnXXQY-IfPSrqBmxWxIn2HuO4akxDQDQ=&emci=ca0c7b2c-201b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a9ee1733-201b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1295540)
---
Your thoughts mean a lot to me, folks. I don’t accept a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because I work for you, not for them.
**I hope you’ll take a minute to fill out our Official September Priorities Survey today.**
Thanks so much,
Michael

clean_body: Please take a minute to fill out this survey. | = Hi there, I’m back in Washington after a productive time back home in Colorado. I spent time with Susan and our girls, and traveled 1,850 miles around our state across 15 counties. The folks I met made it clear that they want to see action in Washington on the issues facing our state. Already this year, we passed the American Rescue Plan which is helping us recover from the pandemic and has us on track to cut child poverty nearly in half and we’re working to pass the infrastructure package, which includes my provision for a historic federal investment in our nation’s broadband. I spent the month of August traveling the state and hearing from folks, but I didn’t get a chance to hear from you. Will you take a minute to fill out our Official September Priorities Survey and share your thoughts? Tell me what you think we should prioritize while the Senate is back in session. | | Your thoughts mean a lot to me, folks. I don’t accept a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because I work for you, not for them. I hope you’ll take a minute to fill out our Official September Priorities Survey today. Thanks so much, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Glenn Youngkin has a clear and strong vision for Virginia. He knows there’s a lot to do in just four short years, so he’ll start his term strong with a Day One Game Plan.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Gabe Vasquez.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36195544/307366255/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_NO_20210921_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZkNWJkNi0yMDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frftaRGDUz28aXOHF-XPorVThwFDvADnCPiScNh7jPU=&emci=cbd2ac7e-031b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=496d5bd6-201b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Here’s the reality of the situation, friend: The odds of keeping the House of Representatives majority in this midterm election are not on our side. But we can and will protect it if we focus on taking back seats in competitive districts. New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District should be one of our top targets. Democrats winning that seat in 2018 helped us flip the House. We can take it back again now. Gabe Vasquez can win this seat. I’ve known Gabe for a long time. I know he’ll put in the work to get it done — and he needs us to join him in that effort. That’s why I’m rolling out my endorsement of him now — early in this race, because we have no time to lose. Everything Gabe does is rooted in his passion for the people and places of Southern New Mexico. He’s a proven fighter for economic justice, equal pay for equal work, affordable housing, and high-quality healthcare for all. Gabe knows how to bring people together and deliver real results. **Republicans will throw everything and the kitchen sink at Gabe to stop him from taking this seat. Meanwhile, Gabe’s already working to build a people-powered campaign to fight back and win. But we can and will protect it if we focus on taking back seats in competitive districts. New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District should be one of our top targets. Democrats winning that seat in 2018 helped us flip the House. We can take it back again now. Gabe Vasquez can win this seat. I’ve known Gabe for a long time. He voted against COVID relief.

He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

clean_body: Let me explain why your support matters. | | | I wish I didn't have to ask for money. = Let me explain why your support matters. = I’m the son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. My parents raised me to ‘keep my feet on the ground but reach for the stars.’ So I’ve dedicated my life to public service, in hopes of making a difference in my community. As a State Senator I’ve looked beyond party labels to actually get things done for the folks I swore to serve -- like creating affordable housing and securing COVID relief funds for local small businesses. And now I’m ready to bring that same approach to Congress. = Through his votes, Congressman Don Bacon has shown us what his priorities are. He voted against COVID relief. He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. And he voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations, instead of helping hardworking families. It’s clear we need new leadership, but I’m going to need a huge team of grassroots supporters to help me pull this off. = I’m facing an important Midnight Deadline. To win this important race and fight for hardworking families in Congress, I need to show everyone I have the momentum to pull it off. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = As always -- thank you, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. name: Tim Ryan
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=942%2E3611125%2EP24pMd ][IMG]

Hello,

I wanted to drop you a quick note to thank you. My team tells me we have
officially caught up to our mid-month fundraising goal.

You know how important it is for us to meet every benchmark in this dead
heat race, and we couldn’t have done it without you.

By closing our fundraising gap you’ve shown the GOP we have the grassroots
power to compete with their multi-million dollar super PACs. We’re going
to flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority,
together.

I’m so grateful you’re on our team.

But folks, we can’t let up now. Our most important deadline yet
is right around the corner. At the end of the month, our FEC report will
be published for everyone to see, so we need to put up a strong grassroots
showing.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3811?t=1007&akid=942%2E3611125%2EP24pMd ]Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more to keep our momentum going so
we can win this thing? Every dollar you give matters.

subject: HUMILIATING defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.) I need your immediate attention:

**1.** Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats to retake our Majority.
**2.** They launched a $5 MILLION attack to take it from us.
**3.** A devastating new poll shows their attacks are working -- _**they just took the lead by ONE point.**_

**[I don't know how else to say this: If we don't spring into action -- and SOON -- Republicans could take the Majority right out from under us. I'm calling for a swift and POWERFUL response -- 2,000 gifts before midnight -- to defend our House Majority, help REGAIN the lead in the polls, and ensure Republicans NEVER hold power again. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)[MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)

---

We all have a critical choice to make right now.

\-- Either we let Republicans flood us with expensive attacks, DECIMATE our Majority, and BARGE their way back into power...

**\-- Or we rise up, REGAIN our lead, and show Republicans they will NEVER take the House Majority from us.**

****[I need your help to regain our lead, protect our precious House Majority, and deliver Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat -- and I'm calling for 2,000 gifts before midnight to get the job done. Can I count on you to step up with $3 to defend my House Democrats in this monumental moment? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)****

subject: A landslide victory (except in our district)

Peter, after a summer of being hit with Republican attack ads, a bad poll showing us down seven points, recall election results that don't paint a pretty picture, and even more risks ahead with the redistricting process, it's clearer than ever that we're in danger. **We have to protect Josh by sending in our strongest fundraising report this year, but the deadline is in less than 10 days.**
[**Can you please donate as much as you can right now to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal before it 's too late?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/udpXZZHsOPAorjQDK0TuxDNJwMEuJOdx9juQUAMxwok=/AK1nTJMClHLLGewV7vmBvlu56vsUjfIlWUdx5z1_Avk=?refcode=E11390-20210921-RecallReflection-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
Thanks,

Kierra Newton
_Finance Director, Josh Harder_

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. body:
If Bernie’s $3.5 trillion bill currently under consideration in the Senate passes, you can look at him as your mortgage lender because he will have mo |
Fellow patriot,

**Would you trust Bernie Sanders with your personal finances**?

If Bernie’s $3.5 trillion bill currently under consideration in the Senate passes, **you can look at him as your mortgage lender** because he will have mortgaged the future of every man, woman, and child living in the United States.

Republicans have been emailing and sounding the alarm about Bernie’s bill for weeks on end now, but we’re only getting tepid responses.

**[How would you feel if Bernie Sanders sent you a bill for $24,000? That’s what is about to happen if we don’t act fast.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a5f9907ebb314c00ab2ff0678fed431d&_e=Oc1aq0Myvln8P9PDbZOqRTMz0xXJdzsRpDT3sbkcV1ua4IM1Ey_Fu_uVIGCiD886OfCrnsLPKruWmy3J86yn5shqtW-qwHpUpbEhDv6v74yY1fbqAfXAFy3T9wdCOZbQZLQyjgj2iXDUWbxPwsJ8us_vTMDYL3ZjCGLxQHzzZuhH7FCMpb48buJdpsBHldX0Ne7VP9TukOqtcBz-U0ZTmJ9E3gJOSOWGh65V1XRXWXyMrX0mTOxxu10gD8S-iQ2hk_gCbIUsWr8T-GoCu230BNnNNeAE_YS2B0eBwYCEJaW6qg-y6B1EjjjeFvR38L7XAP7Sd7yhHOI4xoT_dbQGAwr4uKjcCKmFjJ3duop9pnBa-pduEswRf0XspjsxGjX3IyOWMxuaIt5gO85a4Z55a9N6bMsOyGjznc44pJrzKYEJekN-qJblYwTdBUA2dGER4bMV7rF8kxDak1Z7t1DlDbMPcgqSDnVAISiAsGKMdCk%3D)**

name: Official Freitas Survey
subject: Is this government overreach?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Friend, Nick is furious. **President Joe Biden has signed an executive order FORCING
100 million AMERICAN workers to get the COVID-19 vaccine. ** Nick is a firm believer that people have the right to **choose **if they get vaccinated - and that the government **HAS NO AUTHORITY** to force healthcare decisions onto Americans. What do you think, Friend? **Do you agree that Biden is overstepping

Peter,

I'm excited and honored to share with you that fellow JAG Officer, **Senator Lindsey Graham** , has endorsed me and my campaign to defeat Katie Porter and win back California's 45th Congressional District.

Here's the statement from Senator Graham that was just released today:

> _**“I am proud to support Shawn Collins for Congress in California’s 45th district. Shawn is the type of leader we need in the House of Representatives and in the Republican Party. As a fellow veteran, I know firsthand the approach that veterans take to solving our nation’s problems. Shawn will be a conservative who gets things done and puts our country first – not himself or either political party.”**_
> - SENATOR LINDSEY GRAHAM
As an Afghanistan combat veteran, I have the ultimate respect for Senator Graham's military service and the way he has advocated for our troops and always stood by our side.

I look forward to working with Senator Graham and applying my experience serving our country on the battlefield to solving our nation's problems in the halls of Congess and in my district.

[**But first, we must defeat Katie Porter...**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1f3858b3b30a42feb3b982290323a1be&_e=1IAnhMX2CRmSxe0S7hdM7nH9EydqPXCjoPahSmr7RYVe7GNHB477asVIgVy05h286fXNb-CLbotac0HpF8C04keYZfQ337qTZy33PwQsjvRSC8X7nJodXzrgeqagHpMfxJcZZ3GewxFdeocbfeGwvjW_L7ZoBijEQary5FzcYNuLCVu6BSo5K-5y28MCOYSpDAlAfMnatG6vMtlFeWdeWMlprOZ_uZ4hqU2TuW0RBwq3LpUPod2gTNSxjHQZYwx6C_ic4Z_Kuhwb1giELLamFksRX_CAh89XAQiVrKku8_gbNmiuT099qps5E5p6UddBDbpGdGzCWZGa7g8lgunis4ik7AERgOB0W5d7RwdOOH2ePp8kSnX93Pi2Pc66Dk4FLSQojYlCSDTIXCT29gSNHWHDFqvRStch68MbDrrKLJypRISin1VPmCvVqBS9kAw-JWmiK2ufXgCTwm2MZM_i4d9boVjEc3RpU10vS1H1HPY%3D)

Porter seriously lacks the experience to deal with our nation's problems - in fact, **she's making them worse.**

Trillions of dollars in wasteful spending that is adding to our national debt, government-run socialist healthcare, higher taxes, a botched troop withdrawl from Afghanistan that left Americans stranded and on which Porter has _**STILL**_ not commented...

**Katie Porter and the Democrats are failing America.**

My first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since I launched my campaign is coming up on September 30th, and I need your help to raise another $25,000 online so we can hit our goal and have the funds to compete with Porter's massive war chest.

[**Will you join Senator Lindsey Graham in supporting me and my campaign by making a pre-deadline donation of $25, $50, $100 or even more to help me finish this first quarter strong?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1f3858b3b30a42feb3b982290323a1be&_e=1IAnhMX2CRmSxe0S7hdM7nH9EydqPXCjoPahSmr7RYVe7GNHB477asVIgVy05h286fXNb-CLbotac0HpF8C04keYZfQ337qTZy33PwQsjvRSC8X7nJodXzrgeqagHpMfxJcZZ3GewxFdeocbfeGwvjW_L7ZoBijEQary5FzcYNuLCVu6BSo5K-5y28MCOYSpDAlAfMnatG6vMtlFeWdeWMlprOZ_uZ4hqU2TuW0RBwq3LpUPod2gTNSxjHQZYwx6C_ic4Z_Kuhwb1giELLamFqPZX7-7B0bST_3uaOwrG5XDTOV2pOTG5WEiD9Yf3V603WP4X3JamCdg-_qy5urQyiOcCceDR3kMZ0pn1f6w0z1Luh2G3avO0Mh_B3rAbC7Hl7bj2-AstcdHX72IG8UdQumumYtvXc87es07uCLo_P5Oz0GFlOuVXIcRnifM_R0OBDwe3yG8YamKfmD7Y-VCky8OMNxSHsSlQNjqg2qjIoI%3D)

For America,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress

clean_body: I look forward to working with Senator Graham and applying my experience serving our country on the battlefield to solving our nation's problems. | Peter, I'm excited and honored to share with you that fellow JAG Officer, Senator Lindsey Graham , has endorsed me and my campaign to defeat Katie Porter and win back California's 45th Congressional District. Here's the statement from Senator Graham that was just released today: “I am proud to support Shawn Collins for Congress in California’s 45th district. Shawn is the type of leader we need in the House of Representatives and in the Republican Party. As a fellow veteran, I know firsthand the approach that veterans take to solving our nation’s problems. Shawn will be a conservative who gets things done and puts our country first – not himself or either political party.” - SENATOR LINDSEY GRAHAM As an Afghanistan combat veteran, I have the ultimate respect for Senator Graham's military service and the way he has advocated for our troops and always stood by our side. I look forward to working with Senator Graham and applying my experience serving our country on the battlefield to solving our nation's problems in the halls of Congess and in my district. Porter seriously lacks the experience to deal with our nation's problems - in fact, she's making them worse. Trillions of dollars in wasteful spending that is adding to our national debt, government-run socialist healthcare, higher taxes, a botched troop withdrawl from Afghanistan that left Americans stranded and on which Porter has STILL not commented... Katie Porter and the Democrats are failing America. My first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since I launched my campaign is coming up on September 30th, and I need your help to raise another $25,000 online so we can hit our goal and have the funds to compete with Porter's massive war chest. For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

Here's why: Experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. name: Wilmot Collins
subject: 75 Refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
There has been word that 75 Afghan refugees will be arriving in Montana soon. As a former refugee myself, I cannot wait to welcome them to our beautif | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=3ad5667cf03a4bf7881ad5743b4307f7&_e=wtTYO4vafV3wFMaUpuXbkOmLA_MjENvF1vqSVWWLJVOCKoQ7Ey26Rl8GRD5NJw5R4ugWH3jZMulFq54sH91wor5h7YFrJjySBKaxVgVIy2C1AlTni1RN4XlzRihKCMeb1ZRJMtDQ-T7Jk_y1Mu4PCB68GnhAsA8B20pzLr8HVDsB2RBr1xWM7z7jrgc2a3XcEtoQ9iJCyqxuYIAF3DdpVSNo8aOqdWpRCIyKrMlMahUIs2iVkC6iDKKAvYY23tdaO6MKaMndCLMunZ2us9wohuc-_9pKXtWl3OMcuFqOOCMivbs4Am6Vz8J_FcI44O63g6SnUNzshNg41cuFTS2mvzZxCRH1pFIyYJ2LkGWPH7zg3kUWzsOs-dcoc9adVlNIxDGNIpRUAwwldw63g5UDSdKN4wXwDh8bL4sZb3GSz-9EMpfHwBkjff8zLhxCGB88CyuP4OogsNSaO53KYEh40AFlczXv8d4gYLkVYFUp7nQ%3D) Hey friend, There has been word that 75 Afghan refugees will be arriving in Montana soon. As a former refugee myself, I cannot wait to welcome them to our beautiful home. People like Congressman Matt Rosendale only want to spread negativity and xenophobia by opposing their relocation. **Refugees are NOT A THREAT** , and we cannot let these right-wing extremists convince people that they are. They are just trying to escape a mess that the U.S. helped create. **[Help us stand up against people like Matt Rosendale and donate $30 dollars now so that we can continue to fight for the refugees who need our support.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=3ad5667cf03a4bf7881ad5743b4307f7&_e=pF_kQThX3NeFGrmLezYuobV21nLW9FjTTjPsrl1kKzyfy5RKb-xbuu9ICsOCIbJNOj-E3IGosnFfoUMtnR72pBExR0-Guw_dX0Djoff8jZtOGzydopUKTawh7UDtvcAx6lfAtWDi3AUdsQozjCx40-gM-W_qGmybXfH8rsmu9rdWsXk4BnCxLYnJsrtpzWbNVDbeA_flt0bdmv7Lwm5mgo7dtXg-Ev32HtHy22toR2YAQNWplcaOx06nN31lwAKk546VQOkRA9O3Yed-USGRVSNhQ_PQ62BrY9bus_iRP6oXpYojxFRKmcficT-BIIZ4QT5u0ip46PZuGO5emi4xSD9-8aAhfqucloBZGoPQtt4BnIZCs8BedZWe3w_mIyJgUq72efgG2M9uwHl9JOwiPfRinzlq85awuA2w7HajeaQlz6pqLpOIw34NseYD3QO9sMWCayMtnMX5WbhT-_AO23IyqEjpK2lpM8Xc9gKF8zmS4F0gqkyI40kV69X9za3H)** [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=3ad5667cf03a4bf7881ad5743b4307f7&_e=pF_kQThX3NeFGrmLezYuobV21nLW9FjTTjPsrl1kKzyfy5RKb-xbuu9ICsOCIbJNOj-E3IGosnFfoUMtnR72pBExR0-Guw_dX0Djoff8jZtOGzydopUKTawh7UDtvcAx6lfAtWDi3AUdsQozjCx40-gM-W_qGmybXfH8rsmu9rdWsXk4BnCxLYnJsrtpzWbNVDbeA_flt0bdmv7Lwm5mgo7dtXg-Ev32HtHy22toR2YAQNWplcaOx06nN31lwAKkcWFeeHo8ukBroEdUZH3VsEnvCF_VfNzodW4tEYVHAqyiY7Oy3-mUEm_JHqczBOPeMjI0VI9YLMFRMbzgtOaTUzZQSuQbeU7Wm8hbHouXP6DuIvHcvxByg8G4K-Cwwe360BDVG7wRlX-2ENjwE23V7lWUdc7rug0jZEkcX6CsiLfbBALLmJgDwNgNpk3HlbIbd5RsW-sasjOxlZNHt8phdokTascySXhmirg6bSmH_r4%3D) When I came to Helena as a Liberian war refugee, I was scared of how people would receive me since I was coming from a chaotic war situation. But when I arrived people’s arms were open to me, and that was very humbling. Coming to Montana was definitely a culture shock for me and I have no doubt that it will be the same for these refugees. However, if we embrace them with open arms, I am sure that they will flourish and come to love Montana, just as I did. **I know that these refugees could really enrich our communities with their experiences and culture as long as we accept and support them.** I would not be where I am today had the people of Helena not done this for me, so let’s make sure we do the same for them. And who knows, maybe one day you will see one of them in office. **[Will you chip in today in support of showing these refugees the compassion and kindness that I know you all have?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=3ad5667cf03a4bf7881ad5743b4307f7&_e=pF_kQThX3NeFGrmLezYuobV21nLW9FjTTjPsrl1kKzyfy5RKb-xbuu9ICsOCIbJNOj-E3IGosnFfoUMtnR72pBExR0-Guw_dX0Djoff8jZtOGzydopUKTawh7UDtvcAx6lfAtWDi3AUdsQozjCx40-gM-W_qGmybXfH8rsmu9rdWsXk4BnCxLYnJsrtpzWbNVDbeA_flt0bdmv7Lwm5mgo7dtXg-Ev32HtHy22toR2YAQNWplcaOx06nN31lwAKkcWFeeHo8ukBroEdUZH3VsLk7-ZN8JFDv2BUaU9mGd0Rrlt4bF3yaF5fRMBwvsHAKhsER4smuol1rP_kJ1I6Oe-i_W99AGk4UsmzRpsU2KPLEEtGdgBJY1OELRBc2Q0EAmLP-Pdqn5s0RRI8bs_biQM0vbkf9pdU8NXu63dj_05Z0NZFFIjd_Ge2YkATaOKT2Pmvo7cp3vi7bBNn2ofM4Yq-z60UfHQ16jtX5X1H7Zog%3D)** It is important that we maintain the integrity of our State and don’t let it fall victim to the fear-mongering of others. Thank you so much for having my back and welcoming these refugees to Montana, Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: We got chills watching this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is why we’re in this race.
#
Check out this new video our campaign released today:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15312?t=1&akid=468%2E3698%2EySYLFK)
In it, Erica gives a passionate speech about why she’s running. Here’s just a small taste:
> _“Any time our Black brothers and sisters can’t even barbecue at the barbecue pit in a public park without being called by the police, it's for this cause that we’ve got to gather...How long are we going to sit back and not stand up and protest? I’m gon’ tell it like Auntie Maxine told ya. Not one second.”_
We got CHILLS hearing that in person.
**Not one more second** will we wait for corporate-backed, removed, greedy politicians to listen.
**Not one more second** will we wait for racial justice.
**Not one more second** will we wait for living wages.
**Not one more second** will we wait to be treated like _human beings_.
Erica has been fighting long and hard for the folks who politics as usual has left behind. [**_Watch our new video, and then make a contribution of $5 today to help fuel Erica’s grassroots fight for a better North Carolina and a better country._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15312?t=2&akid=468%2E3698%2EySYLFK)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15322?refcode=em20210921-468&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=468%2E3698%2EySYLFK)**
This race is our opportunity to make the changes we want to see. Democrats have the House, the Senate, and the White House and they are _still_ struggling to deliver life-changing, bold, progressive policy. **We need to elect progressive representatives who will stand firm in their beliefs, and fight for policies that will transform people’s lives for the better— that’s Erica.**
[**Watch now, and make a donation of $5 today to help Erica win this race for U.S. Senate and continue to stand up and speak out against injustice everywhere?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15312?t=22&akid=468%2E3698%2EySYLFK)
In solidarity,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210921-468-footer&t=23&refcode2=468_3698_ySYLFK&akid=468%2E3698%2EySYLFK)**

clean_body: This is why we’re in this race. Check out this new video our campaign released today: In it, Erica gives a passionate speech about why she’s running. Here’s just a small taste: “Any time our Black brothers and sisters can’t even barbecue at the barbecue pit in a public park without being called by the police, it's for this cause that we’ve got to gather...How long are we going to sit back and not stand up and protest? I’m gon’ tell it like Auntie Maxine told ya. Not one second.” We got CHILLS hearing that in person. Not one more second will we wait for corporate-backed, removed, greedy politicians to listen. Not one more second will we wait for racial justice. Not one more second will we wait for living wages. Not one more second will we wait to be treated like human beings. Erica has been fighting long and hard for the folks who politics as usual has left behind. This race is our opportunity to make the changes we want to see. Democrats have the House, the Senate, and the White House and they are still struggling to deliver life-changing, bold, progressive policy. We need to elect progressive representatives who will stand firm in their beliefs, and fight for policies that will transform people’s lives for the better— that’s Erica. In solidarity, Erica Smith HQ Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

subject: The Trump network is laser-focused on New Hampshire

body:
| | |

Donald Trump and his allies are all-in on flipping this seat red, friends. Mike Pence, Betsy DeVos, Mike Pompeo, and Rick Scott have all visited the Granite State to rally Trump's base. And Donald Trump himself even praised an extreme, right-wing candidate running against Maggie for Senate. These visits aren't a coincidence. They're an unmistakable sign that the Trump network is laser-focused on flipping New Hampshire red, and right-wing mega-donors think that they can do it by flooding the state with dark money. **So far, Republicans have pumped over $2 million into New Hampshire in an attempt to tarnish Maggie's record and rally their far-right base.** This is just the beginning of what will be one of the most expensive Senate races of the cycle, and with our big FEC deadline less than two weeks away, we can't afford to lose momentum. **[That's why we're asking if you can chip in $5 today to help us defend this seat and take on Trump and his fundraising machine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36197953/307374600/-1669436104?refcode=e20210921_fec-trumpallies&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmRmYWE4OC0yNzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sC8Vs8bS4oMhviCSrC00FjnHyvXaJzDyPCo_pGxkO-c=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36197955/307374602/-1669436104?refcode=e20210921_fec-trumpallies&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmRmYWE4OC0yNzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sC8Vs8bS4oMhviCSrC00FjnHyvXaJzDyPCo_pGxkO-c=)

subject: I'm asking you – right here and now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84tDStyomETCN45IGMTd5XFhiXjkNTOaYLPJbrrzjyqt-V9bvBOaLCUgODj47TyCDBfsEfknIG3JNaiNK0ov0PmR7As4eTQiUQ0ae5I_EjPHdVrO1bzwuV9Ce4uz0zB5zah7thwkI935oX6lNVvqJ6yYXGlaZJ88eBtH5a9XljeQPVDTfgqiDxq-YJRZBXJvplLtKrMGQL_rUPYrXMo5B9Wnh7wVh48HzHejWsmRtWhL9knXZdNziIsLjtG_L68SPb5m_9SfkTByDp3htfkIeJ5JvsucBwoRCVibI7vKQu66E/3fi/q9bAhql4SX291rRt_IjZgg/h0/uIBJOb_w1tr7LngrC43aMy7R4oUph7JJakundPgV5Rw)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84tDStyomETCN45IGMTd5XFh2_UAZVirllyoV6yRwAP6EFuXn-7ee8IYPJ1g4nMp6qFIWUeDgIljaWqltbjDG82LilMDehQo7JCxxJu97Bt3yO0Vm1dVvykwfKzcR6zSV46NlzoCpQ0hxwNEN2JKK2P87LRCJFwYUurf-24H0c80gtOzPuMQm0V1RoZl90_AXSd8KS2hSVzO65-fmMQu9M4G-6RG1dbYFzv_ZGpYvLZqSCl6ohaWAHw1eUajgpLch3vEMSlPhey_w9mNKjYBpr5OEJ-n1MCBiuhD0-FTb_HNG/3fi/q9bAhql4SX291rRt_IjZgg/h1/5zsPIcA34WlktVGFfGt3UNoWQ9GS2cXBilgfNmpu3IU) Derek – my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need _right now_.

The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.

I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals.

clean_body: | | | Derek – my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need right now. The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and The New York Times reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement. I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals. So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started. This team has helped us beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again. Thanks so much for fighting alongside me. – Sen. Raphael Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need _right now_.

The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.

I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals.

**So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**

clean_body: | | | Derek – my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need right now. The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and The New York Times reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement. I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals. So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started. This team has helped us beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again. Thanks so much for fighting alongside me. – Sen. Raphael Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=30ba27ce06044074a53c80854eba506e&_e=zBcYv-MOT_SUEV6cTIZZkBnK_4ByqmYGb3ft4zJRRzs90tcEGO5jnWhF4yaVP5IJfzDdAkVAeHxM_1r_AQ1anywLzP8fFOJCJxL7X2x171G2lsJr998d930IjrgTx4-vyfxBvkKGiW6xPP-Hf5XvA8uuj1N-IAK3eDRkhy1csq-mPR7Trw-0pmYYqUHu-Ymwa2JSlr41NZ6XOoJsuEloLkZGz6wtVytz3nekeZDOfgzcIq9PP_gBA4PBuwar6U_e1gu3GTPt5WQ6e6dSHfqLWMje-ihynVvd9pOwPWwJ86hzt4wSYQTmjEQqKMa4GyJTE7U2IIU1m_bfKIgEez1eang32UwyMwao2WoPJ1S7mwBEwld6z3D05TCyW2-6hl9eiH391vOD6ZLjf13H_p-c4A%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
Attacks from the Mainstream Media are nothing new. This week, I was attacked by the Washington Post.

The Silicon Valley Oligarch, Jeff Bezos-owned Washington Post is alleging I am making America “more vulnerable to the next 9/11.”
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=30ba27ce06044074a53c80854eba506e&_e=zBcYv-MOT_SUEV6cTIZZkBnK_4ByqmYGb3ft4zJRRzs90tcEGO5jnWhF4yaVP5IJfzDdAkVAeHxM_1r_AQ1anywLzP8fFOJCJxL7X2x171G2lsJr998d930IjrgTx4-vyfxBvkKGiW6xPP-Hf5XvA8uuj1N-IAK3eDRkhy1csq-mPR7Trw-0pmYYqUHu-Ymw88uAQ5jgAJTLJgwy3gXVcq35Mf-O6L1ipbhUi0_ri-GNnXxC1f4p3fuCTPuNZZxfVRkt5IKHU5-_iwpHD0hnfO_zmsZiP5ngNijiFSSmidKZA679mrWOfxp4mQ6P4pVdY9lQkH5y0f-7PnCeu3gJgwmmCmRadu8O0tgz4Ob4eUPnHCwecO3paP_I38-vumEknIaKq7GEt6dqmdIAzYM4kA%3D%3D)
Why?

Because I called out the utter incompetence of the Biden Administration’s foreign policy, and the well-publicized international and domestic blunders of the Secretary of Defense and Secretary of State.

I called on Secretary Blinken and Secretary Austin to resign, or face the delayed confirmations of Biden Administration nominees.
[**HELP FIGHT BACK**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=30ba27ce06044074a53c80854eba506e&_e=zBcYv-MOT_SUEV6cTIZZkBnK_4ByqmYGb3ft4zJRRzs90tcEGO5jnWhF4yaVP5IJfzDdAkVAeHxM_1r_AQ1anywLzP8fFOJCJxL7X2x171G2lsJr998d930IjrgTx4-vyfxBvkKGiW6xPP-Hf5XvA8uuj1N-IAK3eDRkhy1csq-mPR7Trw-0pmYYqUHu-Ymw21T_w0V_vsw8g3dzVMRQ3FwFsHBmgUd1_xQKuzHPVn5pAhGBjdPOd9RZVeCNFji74ZAUJaEE3agP30F619Q_MNX9JLrONztIlpOkziOvL_8LifRoJYf7EwkuBLKhIzAfO8kypOK4fXdbCY1nmeaJ4yKKj9FjXcL90EWdIRT7kOdqxyRm8OBPd3vPqLIt292uVjAZRllXh1SS7UnTTd9HaQ%3D%3D)
Only the mainstream media could watch the Biden Administration botch the withdrawal of Afghanistan and leave the Taliban armed with billions of dollars worth of high-tech military equipment, and then allege that I am making America less safe.

Are you really surprised? I’m not, because I have taken the fight right to the heart of the swamp, calling out the devious relationship between the Silicon Valley (Jeff Bezos), the mainstream media (The Washington Post), and the Biden Administration.

I’m not scared, and I won’t back down. Will you join me in my fight to hold Big Tech, Fake News, and Joe Biden accountable?
[**DONATE >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=30ba27ce06044074a53c80854eba506e&_e=zBcYv-MOT_SUEV6cTIZZkBnK_4ByqmYGb3ft4zJRRzs90tcEGO5jnWhF4yaVP5IJfzDdAkVAeHxM_1r_AQ1anywLzP8fFOJCJxL7X2x171G2lsJr998d930IjrgTx4-vyfxBvkKGiW6xPP-Hf5XvA8uuj1N-IAK3eDRkhy1csq-mPR7Trw-0pmYYqUHu-YmwTd2ZXfr7oytlnP1dX3-Yle-t017l7hv6VZ6inN3Os3ULMtE3sOpo1yPFr_eDOfLYFn8YuBuqVW-H-3R5irQD8zQ4mEjctpF-g61Hl1fppBrCRosfQVj7GYFcK2bOYwrjMdKn7xP6jr8wixZekb0fDlVSgtwxZsdyP2Mr1zDPx1nO2LrM1cp93GhaFuHukYhw2t20N_E5o1YlNF2wT21-eg%3D%3D)
In Liberty,

Josh Hawley

subject: Democrats are self-serving liars

body:
I'm planning legal action against the state of Oregon for illegal gerrymandering and I need your help to ensure we're successful I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=b1c0acf637774502baa547aa7accd19b&_e=iRZWNiFKfvCAvalUoLik6_7EJSKoZClCw81EpLzHp32zubGuqW2l2ntlhBWRZ1e3FgmAdyieNhee2HEO53GZL096iOVXHXyPa_c49b-7iWA8gasu9IC2WOlOKq5lReltExcjfy3Pv_4gbpTO9cIQ0x1vNpqbertom-XX_xxsMRuIuviNarK0Q4-nnNVmbjPl7gyrpE9_WKw_EEuNu6wazXVaCShHxlZWh9_t-rNqzZQZGxByLafO_3hJ_Xp2TCjv2cCGOZg0WzhtYbBR_O-WfoinoK1LzeDC0Im-_zc-TgpBC-kUxpXNWLOoNC9RIBvFA3u3ZkGlO8EohYMc3Yt1JBbOJuk457AEHCGK9Ed8o_zIo9O3EULUPxqxuLvjrRRnCq25Y6xlW8mgaK1tUF6yAtRaPSr4EFYk-rmmN2TxmrpiFLt6gAigNRr7QAm8HH-O)

Peter,

**Democrats have done it again.** I think all of us want to believe that public servants and elected officials are inherently good people, honest people, even. But when it comes to politics, I’m learning that most times people are **self-serving hypocrites.**

Earlier this year, Republicans and Democrats in Oregon agreed to redraw the state’s congressional districts with both sides having equal input into the final outcome of the maps. The congressional districts’ lines were to be drawn by a bipartisan committee consisting of **three Democrats and three Republicans** , ensuring every Oregonian - at least in theory - would have the option of voting to send someone to Washington DC who shared their beliefs.

But as it turns out Democrats really are self-serving liars. **This impacts me and my campaign directly as Democrats are going to attempt to stuff every Republican in my current district into another one, theoretically making my race less competitive**.

Why? **[Because they know I pose a threat not only to my liberal opponent, but to the Democrat establishment in Oregon.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=b1c0acf637774502baa547aa7accd19b&_e=iRZWNiFKfvCAvalUoLik6_7EJSKoZClCw81EpLzHp32zubGuqW2l2ntlhBWRZ1e3FgmAdyieNhee2HEO53GZL096iOVXHXyPa_c49b-7iWA8gasu9IC2WOlOKq5lReltExcjfy3Pv_4gbpTO9cIQ0x1vNpqbertom-XX_xxsMRuIuviNarK0Q4-nnNVmbjPl7gyrpE9_WKw_EEuNu6wazXVaCShHxlZWh9_t-rNqzZTl5oKXzno469zdNA4bAplQ5M5XmxS_IRGyFTjUtbH0R8cXQAVaXPYekjLRXZaDx2AxxXicf3Him6pYD69Yvs9Ve76W2A2boKkSN8V2OEGpbqdguMMswOxfF2EVIoNOtHT1K8hIerAMr-rhkUaAMsH0rcFZYk_UVPsFgtbBzjy1Lv91e8x2Ck2vSGLR1H1sYU2PNL_TQl79MYiJfMonObLX)** I don’t care whether Republicans or Democrats are the ones doing the gerrymandering - **it’s a terrible practice and it serves as a prime example of public corruption.**

**[I intend to bring suit against the committees drawing these maps and I’m asking for your help today. Would you possibly be able to chip in $5 or $10 right now to ensure that every American – whether in Oregon, Kansas, Tennessee or Florida- has the opportunity to be represented by someone who shares their beliefs?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=b1c0acf637774502baa547aa7accd19b&_e=iRZWNiFKfvCAvalUoLik6_7EJSKoZClCw81EpLzHp32zubGuqW2l2ntlhBWRZ1e3FgmAdyieNhee2HEO53GZL096iOVXHXyPa_c49b-7iWA8gasu9IC2WOlOKq5lReltExcjfy3Pv_4gbpTO9cIQ0x1vNpqbertom-XX_xxsMRuIuviNarK0Q4-nnNVmbjPl7gyrpE9_WKw_EEuNu6wazXVaCShHxlZWh9_t-rNqzZT1XhZFzONRq_JCfV5-R4aPM61cmuGm22fZijHz9RhNkUOia6SzDbaK9VTVvgIhEAKKwwQuxR_rvwd-ECkLCXLmENF99fnuN2-78rRin10Yv6PIaN30wAiTJ0XnfIfkqQiagyboq8mOKjstY_FGyo3MXFj1dfbSGHuTmMxCYZCENZewhCcuIzTcEPpJ3jgPRzGWAy-dB2AMd075ETVLWGno)**

**I won’t be silenced.**

clean_body: I'm planning legal action against the state of Oregon for illegal gerrymandering and I need your help to ensure we're successful I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Democrats have done it again. I think all of us want to believe that public servants and elected officials are inherently good people, honest people, even. But when it comes to politics, I’m learning that most times people are self-serving hypocrites. Earlier this year, Republicans and Democrats in Oregon agreed to redraw the state’s congressional districts with both sides having equal input into the final outcome of the maps. The congressional districts’ lines were to be drawn by a bipartisan committee consisting of three Democrats and three Republicans , ensuring every Oregonian - at least in theory - would have the option of voting to send someone to Washington DC who shared their beliefs. But as it turns out Democrats really are self-serving liars. This impacts me and my campaign directly as Democrats are going to attempt to stuff every Republican in my current district into another one, theoretically making my race less competitive. Why? I don’t care whether Republicans or Democrats are the ones doing the gerrymandering - it’s a terrible practice and it serves as a prime example of public corruption. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | Oregon Democrats promised to work with Republicans on redistricting, but now they are breaking their word and rigging the electoral system to ensure that these districts will create as many Democrat elected officials as possible, while silencing those who disagree I won’t be silenced. I know that you may not live in Oregon, but we are all going to be impacted by continued Democrat control of the U.S. House. . Democrats know that I can flip the seat I’m running for - putting Republicans withing reach of victory. That’s why they’re effectively cheating to keep my opponent’s seat safe. Please let me know I have your support in this fight. It may be our last shot at a fair race. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Marisa Wood
subject: McCarthy is bullying, lying, and threatening.
body:
Kevin McCarthy is bullying, lying, and threatening people he disagrees with just to advance his political career. Exactly the type of behavior I teach my kids to avoid. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36200521/307382245/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA2NDVhNS0yZjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TECsqZCXeGoi6T9UpSxkrwKpZoC9xhU2TrpBPUeNFow=)
I'm an educator, friend. That means it's my job to find the best way to explain complicated concepts to my kiddos.

**But when it comes to explaining the stakes in my race, it’s not that complicated: Kevin McCarthy is doing everything he can to protect the far-right and Trump, while real people who need help in our community are being left out to dry.**

I elaborate more in this "Kevin McCarthy 101" I put together. I hope you'll take a moment to watch:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36200522/307382246/849255067?refcode=em-92121-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA2NDVhNS0yZjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TECsqZCXeGoi6T9UpSxkrwKpZoC9xhU2TrpBPUeNFow=) | **[Watch the video →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36200523/307382247/849255067?refcode=em-92121-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA2NDVhNS0yZjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TECsqZCXeGoi6T9UpSxkrwKpZoC9xhU2TrpBPUeNFow=)**
---

In class, I talk a lot about leading by example.

Kevin McCarthy is bullying, lying, and threatening people he disagrees with just to advance his political career -- exactly the type of behavior I tell my kids to avoid.

It’s a shame that our district is represented by one of the most high-ranking politicians in the country, yet he behaves so poorly and hasn’t delivered much -- if anything -- to working people in our community.

**Kevin McCarthy doesn't deserve the Speaker's gavel, let alone to represent the Central Valley. But I can't beat him without your help, which is why I'm asking:**

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c340%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=EHCqV8B2rDblHRfuuxXbsg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66670%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Njx9ddYm59dlrK2JnIAN6w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66671%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ktVp07HbIzAF4%2ffZNS%2fkFQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66671%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ktVp07HbIzAF4%2ffZNS%2fkFQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c340%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=EHCqV8B2rDblHRfuuxXbsg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c340%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=EHCqV8B2rDblHRfuuxXbsg&sysid=1)
