name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Democrats are self-serving liars
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I'm planning legal action against the state of Oregon for illegal gerrymandering and I need your help to ensure we're successful I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ff3add798406494e9c13cf918db339e4&_e=_jkxDz0qvCajGLZE4a278EhTl-LbTK7_mjyXDuqKZkP861YiDiUVSBtWMxaq227cnfjBHbuscvrTJfrhMxe8GJBNCch78-39aF5-D7lplVT5-Vw_RIGjdDeJnCuJUKu3urrfkeU2pzTPss-og4bN0kfwA0eQi3lvygHst2dE-d-wyBof0_8fONUArWjrqUyR6Osj9nH5N9_-cXsRcYRMxvWBYPLL6gHyEVM9KwJztVW5dc7bVQqd5XscF06PGjHmeEj-jeWLtUx-8FycFO92gUyg2mVjkRTAIEEcRIGQWE81PsIsRJCvOZCzA9dAASSHd2v0zAMgZWLk3498289uNJ1nIjGyly_yiTWBI78bsGiMiEF_IzEqQ7KQ35Bi70-Llv7HMrF2gpW0zgMuEY7ZWvxK_Yf1IvScxIr-aO0tfoBM2DcacxVAJsDIgwav-a1h)
---
Peter,

**Democrats have done it again.** I think all of us want to believe that public servants and elected officials are inherently good people, honest people, even. But when it comes to politics, I’m learning that most times people are **self-serving hypocrites.**

Earlier this year, Republicans and Democrats in Oregon agreed to redraw the state’s congressional districts with both sides having equal input into the final outcome of the maps. The congressional districts’ lines were to be drawn by a bipartisan committee consisting of **three Democrats and three Republicans** , ensuring every Oregonian - at least in theory - would have the option of voting to send someone to Washington DC who shared their beliefs.

But as it turns out Democrats really are self-serving liars. **This impacts me and my campaign directly as Democrats are going to attempt to stuff every Republican in my current district into another one, theoretically making my race less competitive**.

name: Team Kaptur
subject: The GOP’s unethical acts of desperation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
The redistricting maps proposed by the GOP-led panel are so partisan and unfair that they’re only allowed to be used for the next four years instead of the usual 10. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux6fGVdUZik_q8OF09GsAUQ5rlZ_oEj8mrMKOVKUQiMwNJQ6iDHwKUknI0_6AxMHZUxdmbnTfPBdWb1Aztt1dD6xKIO7212wayfQ8a7iNujtkIlyKHLtApTV7uafXgjApbtJSXRnZQ3LtZGJ6NsxlYvRbcUwRLlAQGOJBvvoL9asUr8FJfP77rwo6Fu_baBmHFlyH9x3gdNC91E4cmO2LFR9tHKgpi11aqxkNXYc8Elu-JB66VCpdJB9ltix_OF08IOgyWl599ld4eIubMYnkj1Y3I1wSKh55_Fm4YZuahoCgSAnHK8hqGVhzQMthG5LhzF1f-wTsF63nFzz94yPlGoY6Z1dkwkI1v1xHGURw-9mLvEy8N5XLFg4ty_Ty8WzwtIOAit7qp7sIfBHaDxzucr8/3fi/CH2cEJdeStWqhLOLHxFvlw/h0/qF-A4Oj2XURF98skvnIBdNENIm-vwFiZw0nB8XEpcFk)

| | Team,

The redistricting maps proposed by the GOP-led panel are so **_partisan_** and **_unfair_** that they’re only allowed to be used for the next four years _instead_ of the usual 10. And that’s _before_ the lawsuits based on the illegal manner in which the maps were passed get their day in court.

If this sounds wrong to you, it gets worse; the maps were approved **_without_ the votes of the Democratic members** on the commission. That is unacceptable and anti-democratic.

**Ohioans are upset, and we will not be silenced. This is not what we voted for in 2018 --_we voted to end gerrymandering, not increase it._**

Republicans continue to betray the people of Ohio. They are so committed to their own political agenda that they will stop at nothing to secure their success and power -- _even if it weakens our democracy._

clean_body: The redistricting maps proposed by the GOP-led panel are so partisan and unfair that they’re only allowed to be used for the next four years instead of the usual 10. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, The redistricting maps proposed by the GOP-led panel are so partisan and unfair that they’re only allowed to be used for the next four years instead of the usual 10. And that’s before the lawsuits based on the illegal manner in which the maps were passed get their day in court. If this sounds wrong to you, it gets worse; the maps were approved without the votes of the Democratic members on the commission. That is unacceptable and anti-democratic. Ohioans are upset, and we will not be silenced. This is not what we voted for in 2018 --we voted to end gerrymandering, not increase it. Republicans continue to betray the people of Ohio. They are so committed to their own political agenda that they will stop at nothing to secure their success and power -- even if it weakens our democracy. subject: we still need you in the fight for immigration reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Senator Durbin and Senate Democrats WILL NOT give up on this fight. Are you with them?
#
Peter,
We got some disappointing news this week when the Senate parliamentarian overruled Democrats’ plans to include a path to legal status for immigrants in the budget reconciliation package.
**_But this fight isn’t over, Peter_**. As the original author of the Dream Act in 2001, Senator Durbin has been working for years to provide a path to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of Dreamers and comprehensive reform for millions of immigrants to our country.
Senator Durbin and Senate Democrats _WILL NOT_ give up on this fight. Are you with them?
**[Add your name to the petition right now if you’re still in the fight for immigration reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36201261/307384220/1661918113?ms=dd_em_210921_1&refcode=dd_em_210921_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjliMjFkNS0zMjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xM11LDYQZDrUyTlYM4t4IAwid-u--YJHlQX_Qy3Yj0=&emci=f4cd460a-2f1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=bb9b21d5-321b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2727974)**
Yesterday, Senator Durbin took to the Senate floor to speak out for DACA recipients and other immigrants who are yearning for a path to citizenship in the country they call home. So many of these immigrants have worked on the frontlines of this pandemic. The least we can do is allow them to pursue legal status and live openly without fear for themselves and their loved ones.
**[Senator Durbin is still in the fight for immigrants and Dreamers. Are you? Sign on now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36201262/307384221/1661918113?ms=dd_em_210921_1&refcode=dd_em_210921_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjliMjFkNS0zMjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xM11LDYQZDrUyTlYM4t4IAwid-u--YJHlQX_Qy3Yj0=&emci=f4cd460a-2f1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=bb9b21d5-321b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2727974)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

clean_body: Senator Durbin and Senate Democrats WILL NOT give up on this fight. Are you with them? Peter, We got some disappointing news this week when the Senate parliamentarian overruled Democrats’ plans to include a path to legal status for immigrants in the budget reconciliation package. But this fight isn’t over, Peter. As the original author of the Dream Act in 2001, Senator Durbin has been working for years to provide a path to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of Dreamers and comprehensive reform for millions of immigrants to our country. Senator Durbin and Senate Democrats WILL NOT give up on this fight. Are you with them? Yesterday, Senator Durbin took to the Senate floor to speak out for DACA recipients and other immigrants who are yearning for a path to citizenship in the country they call home. So many of these immigrants have worked on the frontlines of this pandemic. The least we can do is allow them to pursue legal status and live openly without fear for themselves and their loved ones. Thank you, Team Durbin * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Patty Murray
subject: It's going to take all of us to defend our Democratic Senate majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need your help.
#
Peter: Since Democrats won control of the Senate, we’ve taken huge steps to speed up vaccinations, get the economy moving, and protect the future of the planet. **But we have a major problem.**
With Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans only need to flip _one_ seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell -- which means our entire agenda depends on not losing a _single_ Democratic seat. That's why I'm writing to you today.
**CNN just named my friends Catherine Cortez Masto (NV), Maggie Hassan (NH), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Rev. Raphael Warnock (GA) the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for reelection. We need to do everything we can to win these races, so I'm personally asking:[Will you give $5 or more right now -- anything you can spare before midnight tonight -- to help us hold these seats and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36201615/307384964/1804573292?refcode=pm_em_210921_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODk5MjUyZS0zNDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yy1qHu4Yfu487ulV95ud2ELP64EO0GasWAOi5Byxtd4=)**
When we took back the Senate in January, Democrats made a promise to fight for everyday people, and so far, we're delivering on that promise. We're fighting to make progress in everything from health care to infrastructure -- and Catherine, Maggie, Mark and Raphael have been leading the charge in the Senate. I know they're the strong leaders we need to rebuild in the wake of this pandemic, but they need our help.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reported that Republicans started out favored to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell -- and with the GOP already spending MILLIONS in these battleground states, we don't have a minute to waste.**
**[So please, Peter: Will you rush a donation before our critical midnight deadline so we can keep these four critical seats and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Time is tight and we're still falling short of our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36201616/307384965/1804573292?refcode=pm_em_210921_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODk5MjUyZS0zNDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yy1qHu4Yfu487ulV95ud2ELP64EO0GasWAOi5Byxtd4=)**
We can’t win without your support. Thank you for pitching in.
Patty Murray

| This summer, millions of Americans looked out their windows to see a catastrophic hurricane or devastating fires. **There’s no room for debate: The climate crisis isn’t coming, it’s here.**
---
| | **Nearly 1 in 3 Americans experienced a weather disaster this summer**

-_Washington Post_
---
That’s why Congress needs to pass the Green New Deal now. Climate change is one of the biggest challenges facing humanity, and it's going to take bold action to reverse the impacts and preserve the planet for future generations. **I’m proud to join so many of my colleagues as an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal.[_To show that you have my back, consider making a contribution to my re-election campaign to keep me in Congress advocating for crucial issues like the Green New Deal._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36201728/307385224/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210921-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODkyNWNjZi0zNDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-lcSp6qnjCxrV1fUTrXFCyBygIdJgWJtkKRVmAWMCs=)**

clean_body: We need structural changes to combat climate change in an equitable way. | = | This summer, millions of Americans looked out their windows to see a catastrophic hurricane or devastating fires. There’s no room for debate: The climate crisis isn’t coming, it’s here. | | Nearly 1 in 3 Americans experienced a weather disaster this summer -Washington Post That’s why Congress needs to pass the Green New Deal now. Climate change is one of the biggest challenges facing humanity, and it's going to take bold action to reverse the impacts and preserve the planet for future generations. I’m proud to join so many of my colleagues as an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal.= | = We need structural changes to combat climate change in an equitable way. The Green New Deal would rebuild our infrastructure, create clean energy jobs, and tackle growing economic inequality. It also means jobs, justice, and a better future for the next generation. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Sara Jacobs * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Spineless Dean Heller is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Ex-Senator Dean Heller just threw his hat into the Nevada governor’s race.
#
Team, ex-Senator Dean Heller just threw his hat into the Nevada governor’s race.
I defeated Dean Heller in 2018 after voters made it clear that they were done with his broken promises, and now I’m asking for your help to send that message again.
**[Trump lackey Dean Heller and National Republicans are teaming up to flip Nevada red -- Will you chip in $5 to Democratic Governor Steve Sisolak to help defend this Battleground State?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36202140/307386223/-1333604669?refcode=jr_em_nd_210921_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTY4MjE4Ni0zNjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjOQreDIU_DCbbrbXkXC5B4qOifiBqL_4oxTmZbj2X8=)**
The last thing Nevada needs is Dean Heller as our last line of defense.
In the Senate, _Heller voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- which would have gutted protections for people with pre-existing conditions and returned us to the days of big insurance companies charging women more than men for the same coverage._
Heller even said he liked “what Texas did” on abortion and promised “the most conservative abortion laws we can have” in Nevada.
Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada. **[That’s why I’m asking for your help to re-elect Governor Steve Sisolak and push forward with the progress we’ve made here in Nevada. Can I count on you to chip in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36202141/307386224/-1333604669?refcode=jr_em_nd_210921_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTY4MjE4Ni0zNjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjOQreDIU_DCbbrbXkXC5B4qOifiBqL_4oxTmZbj2X8=)**
Let's do this,
Jacky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida is right, Biden is wrong.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden wants fear, not solutions |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=00ce9deba0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Vaccination is a personal choice! It should be left to a free people to evaluate the risk and decide for themselves.

Joe Biden doesn't believe we are a free people, and all his actions say that he intends to be a tyrant to us.

THAT means we have a moral duty to oppose him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am the Christian patriot and combat vet [running to take back a tossup district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=52bb8711ab&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who supports Joe Biden in all he does!**

Biden has been doing more crazy things to distract to his failures.

Inflation exploding. The Afghanistan debacle. Invasion on the Southern Border.

So many failures. That's why he is suddenly focusing on persecuting some Americans "on behalf of" others!

FOX News reports:

_Vice President Kamala Harris raised eyebrows on Sunday with her tweet urging Americans to help protect already vaccinated people in order to end the COVID-19 pandemic.

"By vaccinating the unvaccinated, increasing our testing and masking, and protecting the vaccinated, we can end this pandemic. That’s exactly what we are committed to doing," Harris tweeted.

Harris’ tweet was no exception and was met with criticism and confusion.

"’Protecting the vaccinated’ is an odd argument since the vaccinated are already, you know, vaccinated. And the vaccine works in keeping one out of the hospital 99.99 percent of the time per the data," Fox News contributor Joe Concha responded.

**Former Trump administration staffer Kyle Hooten asked, "Why do you need to protect the vaccinated? Doesn’t the vax do that?"**

Fox News contributor Kate Pavlich called Harris’ message "bizarre" and noted the Biden administration appears to be "taking credit for something...the vaccine is supposed to do." _

So why is Biden persecuting unvaccinated people to "protect the vaccinated"? I mean, doesn't that sound ridiculous on its face?
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=843d55d16f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The evidence has always been there that Biden is using COVID measures as political weapons- to punish enemies and reward friends. More evidence of this came this week, when Biden attacked Gov. DeSantis while choking off supply of anti-COVID medicine to Florida!

_The Biden administration is taking over the distribution of the antibodies, which are used to treat COVID-19, and the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) will now be in charge of distribution.

DeSantis strongly criticized the decision on Thursday because it will result in Florida receiving fewer monoclonal antibodies than it previously had. He pledged to "fight like hell" to get the treatment to those in Florida who need it.

Fact Check: Has There Ever Been a Mandated 'AIDS Vaccine'?READ MOREFact Check: Has There Ever Been a Mandated 'AIDS Vaccine'?
NEWSWEEK NEWSLETTER SIGN-UP >
"Just last week, on September 9, President Joe Biden said that his administration would be increasing shipments of monoclonal antibodies in September by 50 percent," DeSantis said at a press conference in Broward County, Florida.

"And yet, on September 13, HHS announced that it was seizing control of the monoclonal antibody supply and that it would control distribution."

DeSantis went on: "We're facing a massive, massive cut in monoclonal antibody treatments abruptly. Just after the president said they would have a 50 percent increase, we're now seeing more than a 50 percent cut for the state of Florida. So we're going to fight like hell to make sure that our folks get what they need."

The Republican governor said Florida could purchase the antibodies directly from pharmaceutical company GlaxoSmithKline.

President Biden also took aim at DeSantis through his official Twitter account on Thursday.

"Republican governors in states like Texas and Florida are doing everything they can to undermine the public health requirements that keep people safe," Biden tweeted.

Under the Biden administration's new plans for monoclonal antibodies, Florida is set to receive 27,850 does of Regeneron this week. That's significantly less than the weekly average of 72,000 that the state's clinics and providers had been ordering, according to DeSantis' office._

Once again, Biden is putting Floridian lives at risk because of his personal hatred of Gov. DeSantis. Florida has the nation's greatest proportion of senior citizens. OF COURSE WE SHOULD HAVE THE GREATEST AMOUNT OF TREATMENT, GIVEN HOW THIS DISEASE AFFECTS SENIORS!

Joe Biden wants senior citizens to die. He wants Floridians to die.

Ron DeSantis is right. Florida has been doing everything right WHILE also protecting our freedoms. And Joe Biden has been doing just the opposite.

**The proof? Florida's new infections are plummeting, not even among the top states in infection rate. The most infected states are all the Blue states impeding on the freedom of their citizens!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2dca6c620c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Florida is doing right by its citizens, thanks to Gov. DeSantis but NO THANKS to Joe Biden!**

I am vaccinated, that was my choice. But I support the rights of our citizens to make their own choices! Florida leads America in the percent of senior citizens vaccinated- almost 90%. People are perfectly capable of making the choices right for them.

_But why aren't Republicans in Congress pushing back against Joe Biden? Do they agree with all his failures and all his tyranny?_

We must use the power of Congress to grind Biden's out of control regime to a stop. Defund Biden!

_I will stand up for Floridians against Biden's disastrous agenda. Darren Soto will not._

What Biden has done is impeachable. Elect me and let's impeach him!

Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress to help! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=39a26a91f8&e=afa21b7626)

[I must raise $25k by the end of this month for my end-of-quarter deadline. Will you help me get there by contributing right now?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=10c0b764db&e=afa21b7626)

No more "nice guy" Swampy politicians.

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4ab255738b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=435d4800af&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

subject: Democrats: Criminals are heroes, not our fallen soldiers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Aja For Congress
body:
They wore kente cloth and kneeled for 8 minutes and 46 seconds in the Capitol Visitor Center to honor George Floyd, but refused to read names of servi They wore kente cloth and kneeled for 8 minutes and 46 seconds in the Capitol Visitor Center to honor George Floyd, but refused to read names of servicemen and women killed in Afghanistan last month. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVETyIRAA3fu02KX8VKRag-LQi9Sqai-WG9KVd23XArb7OLIBNeBKWieRK2M1H1Yt2Ky5ArNErVT0mmCH_JW5pxLg7BFsDWSPvDUNcxNceYT4KiebrMuKnbXyUSq6Dz0kJd1AObOEY4dq457liDa1jzscdLXxLNZkyA7F5kaZ3H6TReGIKF40R4EfR4rEcgShTq__Jamhm1n5Md0ktgmNYwVTqqb9ypFyPw3KB8KHJCQkkg%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVER5BU0gfSNj4P8k6RA11f2WUBxuwlbdCLKVjGMv9XNDuAnzkA67u3Kml4KzIFGnYOSSejPxCDOK4kZnHdN2V70y1EX-qKr8NvtQlqjASB9RugnzjeY-xeGqihqOhOfXtEIBLxCs2RHTpeYssUaU7TmtqwNqP6Gl-PvzP-2JW78-bg5xl2Yzmxqdy6u5-Feu0ImM_hSKrs1drIvdNGGajyspGVs0CPoJCBN1OwTNlIztiQ%3D%3D)
Peter,

House Speaker Nancy Pelosi wore kente cloth and kneeled for 8 minutes and 46 seconds in the Capitol Visitor Center to honor George Floyd, but refused to read names of servicemen and women killed in Afghanistan last month.

**Democrats couldn't even take 30 seconds to read the names of our brave, fallen military members.** They were treated as collateral damage by the Democrats, when they gave their lives rescuing trapped Americans and allies behind terrorist lines.

This should demonstrate to the entire country Pelosi and Washington Democrats only care about people when they can benefit them. [**As a black American and United States Air Force veteran myself, I am completely appalled and making it my mission to defeat these un-American Democrats in 2022 and fire Nancy Pelosi.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVETrrxck_O8nBk3UiK-J2iOPnIr2WqBACLUMpdYNRgKb7Yqg1WItdYVBs6dQgtRc1n0pauqfWEhBokw4MsqDOlOJapGl5t5GnSvQ_1d6ytkY1agbr25nivRNXnaWIg8Yqw_8pqNPOURNvUnRRhLgovxpnJJ9jy-XyJSet4J8WrFZmwlsuE4QXOm0hhnmof713nsLeY0dlPXT7BYEy-ITP0d3clh6OGRlBPW4qBSD8KhvRw%3D%3D)

[**FIGHT THE DEMOCRATS WITH AJA ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVERwvlV1an1MaiEcgjooqNSNmJ06oKBOJ1OlH999UjxABN2k-epFyeSoFNGvTp29kAA9rpeyAF3DkcWVBRS0ha_HTxki7EcoP9ERZE5KMsTpQ0Zwn2EJ596pxo0MjQymA_l3mon2rYJExgkx0YnUB4ecYjImtG356dKMC351YaV29kRpJzLdVncgTlZQv-0tZPfjjOv5SkglM2iz8b9JIt68wwpfB6KhohSCt0C4Gb43ow%3D%3D)
Peter, I want you to understand why I am so upset about the Democrats' actions relating to Afghanistan the past month or so.

I come from a long line of military service. Both of my grandparents served in the armed forces - my grandfather fought in World War II, the Korean War, and in Vietnam. **My great uncle was a Tuskegee Airman pilot.**

After our nation was attacked on September 11, I enlisted in the United States Air Force Reserve. **I was deployed to Qatar in 2007, where I participated in Operation Enduring Freedom.**

Simply put: service to our great nation is in my blood and so is being a black American.**So, I am understandably upset when Nancy Pelosi and Democrats used the death of a black American for their political gain but ignored the sacrifice our military makes for THEIR freedom.**

**I am done with the hypocrisy, the manipulation and the dishonesty coming from the Democrat Party.** [**If you are too, then I ask that you join my campaign immediately and help me take back the House for Republicans.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVEQQ1QdQ5p8wSO2LmVxt7kqOd7j-8W3QtFtQQxeUPrDMKckl1hjPHGS0LkHkrv0duL__o_MzrWZ9JIjQwr_hBQ_ee3zrSNgkvTsRnxMeKbTLWmf3qyn3rVZ9HQHBMCF5ZOXHhGmhhXf1YU3q0Zku-9VXALyLEwvovAOLNj9k-Jcote2MKigAIBpZfnnJ1mk0PAGuJGMhSGg39885X_1zamlO_ZeIT5uEOThilnEt3YwpiA%3D%3D)

[**Peter, with your help, I can become the FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from California. We can make history and send a black veteran to Congress to hold the Democrats accountable - we could change America.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVEThAQ3CBp6XDJnxOU0xKHJPSGkvtm5srhaE4AhLznfTixMDWM9KI1U5KVB-oU10nl50kjb6D7o_tV7X5xLn-G0JTdvGEofpEN8HTItZ5fww9t56fe7C2a1FJ1ogb_qlSF1QotHPpu7m2FKR7lrj4NgXlYjtuUBIRvAtBjISiJBfypC3EaOs224Y8ySXNScN-vhRttXgyBt_vS4savsIieE-knoI7nOohCr8ziXIkTlRNQ%3D%3D)

[**FIGHT THE DEMOCRATS WITH AJA ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf7a804e81e94331a39afef15093f57b&_e=sAxQh3R59UKwApuWLw0sukUYW04_XNbZlVvDoLM9k6aOHkAVaQbQOYMO5Ayln_khsK5XkIkyUKpFukBQSYltLtKkJNAkjHNI1UOk1u6w1Pkzh77pwOAKtQuhEsTcx8s7TRuHLwAgKtO69XFhICpxUnyoyK_pqITxMcIvlEw2buG-wlXOZhm_mKtJ0X4Hh2YAWYvIhIV6ye0KkzOkkIvuCC6jH5ITN8XHaM8h3HbOVERpNMRAkyGO3l1EIJla3SNxxFBLOT6WYuvwDwXbti9Lp7U2pfGauo6Fan-cLDStiqsJ8nsmO05Xa4xhq5IsRdC-zQM-nyULS1atPq11WQ9yK5n6Cj07UC8G3Pc5l_YNKSuSORay5UgeH4kPTY5t9pyJ82ZoihH2VMcjHHa0YoaJBQscjmMMN8yUUS19IThIza3Cr61yhIk5CCnLaHx08ZEXzuNMPAzekrr_vKWbboSrOA%3D%3D)

With you in the fight,

Aja Smith
United States Air Force Veteran
Republican for Congress

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Laura Kelly Needs to GO.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I wanted to follow up one more time. Laura Kelly’s administration failed every step of the way during the COVID-19 pandemic, but handing out almos Friend, I wanted to follow up one more time. Laura Kelly’s administration failed every step of the way during the COVID-19 pandemic, but handing out almost $700 million in fraudulent unemployment benefits was particularly egregious. That money wasn’t hers, it was yours. Your taxpayer dollars were squandered to the tune of $700 MILLION. That alone is a fireable offense. But when you put it on top of destroying a third of Kansas small businesses with lockdowns, trying to criminalize going to church, closing schools, and all the other bad decisions, it’s clear that we need a new Governor here in Kansas. name: Team Scheller
subject: Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller Announces Endorsement from Rep. Mike Kelly (PA-16)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc
body:
Allentown, PA - Today, Today, the Scheller for Congress campaign announced that Rep. Mike Kelly (PA-16) has endorsed Lisa's candidacy for Congress. Contact: Pierce Frauenheim Pierce@SchellerforCongress.com For Immediate Release: **Republican Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller Announces Endorsement from Rep. Mike Kelly** Allentown, PA - Today, the Scheller for Congress campaign is announcing that Rep. Mike Kelly (PA-16) has endorsed her candidacy for Congress. "Lisa Scheller knows what it takes to run a successful business that is a staple in the local community" said Congressman Mike Kelly (PA-16). "I know that when elected to Congress, Lisa will be a strong voice for businesses in her district and that is why I am happy to endorse her candidacy for Congress." "I am proud to receive Congressman Kelly's endorsement and look forward to legislating a pro-business agenda with him in Congress" said candidate Scheller. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve told you about my own major policy priorities if I’m elected the next Member of Congress representing Arizona’s 9th District - in short, I plan to replace the disastrous Democrats’ Debt, Division, and Dependency with smart policies that focus on Economics, Education, and true Equality for all Arizonans and all Americans.

[**But to run the most effective campaign, to truly understand the issues that are most concerning to voters here, I’m counting on the indispensable feedback of grassroots conservatives like you, Fellow Conservative!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7fe0ff030e046c79a9770933bba2d28&_e=fGeso3eql1xBwbVruWQ_DOmBaEW80NaJlCLCSaFS1-a5QLXXbXs2zZqzDZk0b2H5LyzlfV0DDFsIkdHnOxZjW-VuOAHw0ZDMT6nIf-gI0tf8VCWyFOVzM-CUilSyVCmzQI2lU3ZLr6j5-c_LyXHUauiaHwy0espb930EmVPYNqepwafheRToaOEQEvUecIxowBAtIvdEbCSPI-kbNK3CsUySYw6D9jbr4xU92GAqwpndrhpR1Mv1gR6bnHYLmEyZkjV-az5WQwffaKie_Ah3UEoJr7hwT8mMBAKL4UWF-adhFZfE-ErdtUmuzAi1z3YxXPf4JmRQ-d28ryR9_v2iG8xZq8Z-6T4r5bRQJvjG1e7JYtptk4PuJSQBUFBbwwqjyDxsslWz-x7Jim1VKnZqt5P_X49WH4eDnP20RFO6bXC9fdN0h2W7rLmM5kXJQ_vTYK-Kl0n92PFzzBERiEvFon_pv0AuWD-70ubFAJ5e55Tlv0BaYApATz0TOfwpmzC2QMdK2mIviZPz1giSRdHKQ9B1hx72ahwlvX-IceWcyPo%3D)

[** Begin Survey » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7fe0ff030e046c79a9770933bba2d28&_e=fGeso3eql1xBwbVruWQ_DOmBaEW80NaJlCLCSaFS1-a5QLXXbXs2zZqzDZk0b2H5LyzlfV0DDFsIkdHnOxZjW-VuOAHw0ZDMT6nIf-gI0tf8VCWyFOVzM-CUilSyVCmzQI2lU3ZLr6j5-c_LyXHUauiaHwy0espb930EmVPYNqepwafheRToaOEQEvUecIxowBAtIvdEbCSPI-kbNK3CsUySYw6D9jbr4xU92GAqwpndrhpR1Mv1gR6bnHYLmEyZkjV-az5WQwffaKie_Ah3UEoJr7hwT8mMBAKL4UWF-adhFZfE-ErdtUmuzAi1z3YxXPf4JmRQ-d28ryR9_v2iGySU-zC5OWNTA4qVI_QFagNXUFLFyqJQrsV0wGENezBV7PL0oWhou6PUKxtOUu2G4MF_pzXIs33-uIFHGaQOOS2niT2CIgbWQxqV67-Hp0NTTvc6OvEL7G_4OmOmbavvLWY8Y8aXBy6ygnR_PHSaNFU-T1QQFYu5Iqg1My6o0o1OM_abXc65od9Z3MssAE_tM8e4ZtVerxMermefip16lu8%3D)
Fellow Conservative, in my opinion, the Democrats have been doing a predictably terrible job in the majority, spending like there’s no tomorrow and dividing us with radical identity politics.

Please take part in my 2021 Congressional Survey now and be a part of my campaign to bring real change to Washington, D.C.!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7fe0ff030e046c79a9770933bba2d28&_e=fGeso3eql1xBwbVruWQ_DOmBaEW80NaJlCLCSaFS1-a5QLXXbXs2zZqzDZk0b2H5LyzlfV0DDFsIkdHnOxZjW-VuOAHw0ZDMT6nIf-gI0tf8VCWyFOVzM-CUilSyVCmzQI2lU3ZLr6j5-c_LyXHUauiaHwy0espb930EmVPYNqepwafheRToaOEQEvUecIxowBAtIvdEbCSPI-kbNK3CsUySYw6D9jbr4xU92GAqwpndrhpR1Mv1gR6bnHYLmEyZkjV-az5WQwffaKie_Ah3UEoJr7hwT8mMBAKL4UWF-adhFZfE-ErdtUmuzAi1z3YxXPf4JmRQ-d28ryR9_v2iGw0R8mERVvabDKHG1FoXk-k2_xnxGiBvWQuw1vgidaeXRYFeeBtVD7w68SEa7WB2cAr9lFXaxUIJBMYFiPPS6LUB7LKKBJzq6W6WWHTTH9LJ_n5tOgfHMc0NrdPV2UnMR2DDE6IkP7M575R_09ZwKZveny0fLJoq9wUhQl97bHvcTsH7Py4Sozf-_EsptXc10QrAkjzR9gb2pGFiP7Q0FIE%3D)

name: Team Sarah
subject: Asking you to make a small donation before our public FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
**Ron Johnson is the most vulnerable Republican Senator up in 2022, and our race is the Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat and stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the majority.**

National Republicans know that, too. Outside groups and right-wing megadonors are getting ready to sink millions of dollars into battleground races like ours because they believe Republicans have a good shot at taking back the Senate.

Even worse? Ron Johnson’s campaign raised more money than any other Democrat in the race last quarter. He has seemingly unlimited resources at his disposal to keep this seat red and keep his wealthy donors happy with their own personal U.S. Senator.

With the FEC deadline coming up, we still have a long way to go to hit our online fundraising goals. It may not seem like it, but early investments are critical to the outcome of an election. Your contribution today will have a much bigger impact than it would this time next year. That’s just the truth.

**That’s why we’re asking you to add a donation of any amount to help our campaign prepare for the flood of dark money and Republican attack ads in our race. We cannot afford to be caught off guard in a toss-up race like this. clean_body: Ron Johnson is the most vulnerable Republican Senator up in 2022, and our race is the Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat and stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the majority. National Republicans know that, too. Outside groups and right-wing megadonors are getting ready to sink millions of dollars into battleground races like ours because they believe Republicans have a good shot at taking back the Senate. Even worse? Ron Johnson’s campaign raised more money than any other Democrat in the race last quarter. He has seemingly unlimited resources at his disposal to keep this seat red and keep his wealthy donors happy with their own personal U.S. Senator. With the FEC deadline coming up, we still have a long way to go to hit our online fundraising goals. It may not seem like it, but early investments are critical to the outcome of an election. Your contribution today will have a much bigger impact than it would this time next year. That’s just the truth. That’s why we’re asking you to add a donation of any amount to help our campaign prepare for the flood of dark money and Republican attack ads in our race. We cannot afford to be caught off guard in a toss-up race like this. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Help us wish Pramila a happy birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Today is an exciting day, Peter: **It’s Pramila’s birthday! 🎉**
We want to thank her for being a progressive champion and working so hard to transform this country — especially as she fights for the $3.5 trillion Build Back Better Act package that invests in climate action, health care, paid leave, child care, universal pre-K, housing, and so much more.
So, we’re going to surprise her with a birthday card filled with good cheer and well wishes from our grassroots movement! [**Can you join us today in wishing Pramila a happy birthday? You can even leave her a personal note!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pramila-2021-birthday/?source=em20210921-653&t=1&akid=653%2E420207%2EojvwTi)

clean_body: Israel needs the support of her allies. Peter, Congressional Democrats just pulled funding from Israel’s Iron Dome – the missile defense system that has saved countless innocent lives from Hamas rockets. Make no mistake: the Anti-Israel Left is an extremely powerful force within today’s Democratic Party. And the only way to stop them is by taking back the House. The Democrats’ decision to cut Iron Dome funding also harms America. The U.S. and Israel jointly developed the Iron Dome, and shared research from Israel’s use of the Iron Dome helps improve missile systems that protect U.S. bases abroad. The Left’s hostility toward Israel is one of many reasons we must end single-party Democratic control of this country. And my seat is critical to regaining the House majority next year. That’s why I need your support RIGHT NOW. Will you help us? Let’s stand with Israel. Let’s win back the House majority. subject: Rutledge & Sanders Share the Stage for the 1st Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/leslierutledge.com/clarkco?e=624a44d946)

Dear Friends,

Can you spare 30 mins to decide the future of Arkansas? That’s all it will take once you watch both candidates for Governor speak. Until September 9th at the Clark County Republican Dinner In Arkadelphia, Sarah Sanders has refused for 8 months to share the stage with Attorney General Leslie Rutledge to talk about their respective campaigns for Governor. That will probably be the ONLY time you will hear both candidates speak on the same night. Both candidates were given 15 minutes to speak to the crowd of over 500 Arkansas Republicans. Sarah used her time to tell a couple of feel-good, patriotic stories from her job as a spokesperson for the former President. Attorney General Rutledge spoke about her accomplishments as Attorney General, specific policy issues such as pro-life, the second amendment, school choice, eliminating the individual income tax, expanding rural broadband, workforce education and college prep in K-12 schools, support for the military and law enforcement, and not just
tweeting but filing lawsuits and defeating Obama and Biden’s liberal agenda. I encourage you to watch the brief footage below, and ask yourself who is more prepared to lead our great State as the next Governor?
http://www.leslierutledge.com/rutledge-sanders

Sincerely,

Lt. Gen. (AR) Mark Berry (Ret.)
AR State Representative (R-Ozark)
Campaign Chairman, Rutledge for Governor

DISCLAIMER: Mark H. Berry is a retired member of the U.S. Armed Forces. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the United States Air Force or the Department of Defense.

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Border ranchers are uniting behind our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, When Donald Trump proposed a wall on our southern border and further staffing for our border patrol, the liberal media laughed at him. But for Arizonans who endured the border years under Obama, it was no laughing matter. **Here’s the truth – under the Obama administration our border was in crisis._Trump’s wall and border policies were a huge improvement._** Illegal immigration was down. Human traffickers and drug smugglers were being prosecuted. And our border was as close as it ever has been to being secure. **But now, Biden has brought back the failed policies of the Obama years, and our border is a disaster.** I was honored this week to earn the endorsement of multiple ranchers at our southern border. [](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fd92a05ec2f64fbdb91e38cad83f9057&_e=dQCl3kv8x5i_iQffVW_a7pr8Q4WEGSe-kKxzBPR9n4H-0aXU3VbLdSX1EH4SEdlRMFSIkdJHHPAR7km3s7EJQO812-IqARUh4CooXntXtxy_GQVAFiPbBfi_5hRr9tbYTbacx2Qp6Z4iBMM1o6XUlROQ_8LMlfWfykfzsa5pYGApV_PFBO1IlYyVOHZdpZ0Dy_PqXssuN9CkU_GwkaoTcGG2JInY50FvOBCZBxR3JSq46OIpwYTGSi5eprAfpnbdfhX_Ypstheiq57TAMh1ueFb8DYEFNz5DixE_aytDFsvusFdSJpE0O143D5mPIgx3BoZz4sMLzKzrO1pSVaU3DpYU2AgSJVZslEh-cnlLutSJJ1hKREsZUDkNqjTOROb4M1L35loCUXbVx0Ei2mLb5vj4gE_LI47NG6Fkews2QA53Uk0lfhsOURmsw46dPc_HIeSfhjjUPSV4O1_XlCRvWOpPOUI_SsrURrMa_aC2NlY%3D) **No one understands the issues at our southern border like these ranch families who have poured their blood, sweat, and tears into building ranches and being generational stewards of the land. clean_body: Friends, When Donald Trump proposed a wall on our southern border and further staffing for our border patrol, the liberal media laughed at him. But for Arizonans who endured the border years under Obama, it was no laughing matter. Here’s the truth – under the Obama administration our border was in crisis.Trump’s wall and border policies were a huge improvement. Illegal immigration was down. Human traffickers and drug smugglers were being prosecuted. And our border was as close as it ever has been to being secure. But now, Biden has brought back the failed policies of the Obama years, and our border is a disaster. I was honored this week to earn the endorsement of multiple ranchers at our southern border. No one understands the issues at our southern border like these ranch families who have poured their blood, sweat, and tears into building ranches and being generational stewards of the land. I am honored to have earned their endorsements. But I need your support too, friend. Ranchers like these are suffering the effects of Biden placing Kamala in charge of the border. I am running to put an end to this nonsense. As Arizona’s next Attorney General, I’ll enforce Arizona’s laws at the border even if the federal government won’t enforce theirs. \- Tiffany Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
This is a very personal story to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36205361/307416978/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2RiZmNjNC00OTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqsVJRc8u0yxvBm_hISRZz4FrHSIYC1mjU1sMKv0Sek=)
---
Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American.

Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles.

Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war.

**But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman, honored to represent CA-41 in Congress -- and I’m asking for your support.**

American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. [**But Peter, I can’t do it without your support -- so can I count on you to chip in $3 right now and help me build an America that is welcoming and prosperous for all families? clean_body: This is a very personal story to me. | = Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American. Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles. Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war. But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman, honored to represent CA-41 in Congress -- and I’m asking for your support. American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you -- so glad to know I can count on you. \-- Mark Takano Congressman, California's 41st District | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Friends,

_My phone has been ringing off the hook._

Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate on essentially all American businesses is wholly unconstitutional, illegal, and an attack on the free will of millions of Americans.

This mandate is adding salt on the wound to businesses in Indiana and across the nation that are JUST getting back on their feet.

Small businesses are the backbone of our country and what make America so GREAT.

**But in order to keep it this way, we MUST Take Back the Senate. The future of our nation boils down to this.**

**[Flipping the Senate means so much to me, and I hope you understand how important it is.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=efe311dfb7b44746ac51b5872bab29cd&_e=gz5hBF85D20wQCmYsFSQMIEyhwnoVP4YYxsD4eTMkAq88r0w3Y9nIICt8r-i-N8LAksH5lxoLv7Il02zwWcmilXSWe4--ndbGWzHcL3KfmW_IzUdHimVPZ4Owef2kM_KnV6lGS5lnOobKr56uZrgxuO8XUgRE9CYCZiTLN7qBluYcKgH1o0znUri_P2Jq4mVT1zVtncdOtVYotJwXvcdsVdXbZ6cpYIDobIrewaerTmGhC0YbojobL8eLtjtxXWqxx7y9M9B35rJx6BgkgxaQW9aBQtCFiptZoESESGiosKYGADG7TUoWFOq4TIgJShe_w1oINdUsCCSgO_sRLnbQHMzlLOyIY4AqxlB54vhl_z4mfiJdYETIwkbD4O_gZPiZkk4yuheaH5neSmVOgySwIXDAeTFprx5uoWXdFlOx_O6gGGcQRYmyzk2OA-uPnM6hQpAkV0kpHHpK2VlXHfoYA%3D%3D)** | | [**_**NO MORE MANDATES.**_**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=efe311dfb7b44746ac51b5872bab29cd&_e=gz5hBF85D20wQCmYsFSQMIEyhwnoVP4YYxsD4eTMkAq88r0w3Y9nIICt8r-i-N8LAksH5lxoLv7Il02zwWcmilXSWe4--ndbGWzHcL3KfmW_IzUdHimVPZ4Owef2kM_KnV6lGS5lnOobKr56uZrgxuO8XUgRE9CYCZiTLN7qBluYcKgH1o0znUri_P2Jq4mVT1zVtncdOtVYotJwXvcdsVdXbZ6cpYIDobIrewaerTmGhC0YbojobL8eLtjtxXWqujYOrdjQtwY9OLh5KKLBhLd5d-wwNpv2XTEM5BoyoKT4k-y8eENFYWKMNRpROiZ82l702EZdYwKfm2D-lkIxKf0t6QtHQhcId8-kBi-jUNduVl8HOcJY16fFVWeAq8FstgJOETriDUAhK788tPui-mpA6wjAP2RbX9knwbhCPZaWkauOaSw0FTuWLWEGaZVvpnrZ1cctz_Y7mtuvatykQQ%3D%3D)

If you don’t step up, our Conservative values will take a massive hit, and we will be suffering under Pelosi’s reign forever. body:
Now even Stacey Abrams is trying to torpedo our campaign...
| Friend,
---
Just after I launched our Texas Victory Fund to ensure we have the resources to win Texas’ NEW congressional seat, Stacey Abrams announced her Texas tour.
---
Abrams and the Democrats are desperate to stop us, so they’re bringing their playbook from the Georgia runoffs right here to the Lone Star State for the midterms.
---
_**_They know our race is 1 of just 5 seats needed to FLIP the House._**_
---
_We simply can’t afford to come up short at our campaign’s FIRST FEC deadline. That’s why I’ve extended the match on our Texas Victory Fund for one more hour..._

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Did you see Bernie today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
Bernie outside the headquarters of Big Pharma’s top lobbyist today? He was
protesting skyrocketing prescription drug prices and corporate greed.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/67176?refcode=em20210921-19639&t=1002&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]Bernie speaking at a protest against skyrocketing drug prices. Tweet
from Social Security Works that reads Senator Sanders said people die
because they can't afford medicine while 6 companies make $50 billion a
year

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/67176?refcode=em20210921-19639&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]Chip in to fight corporate greed and Big Pharma’s influence in Congress
»

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/67176?refcode=em20210921-19639&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]Fight Back

Corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema don’t even support
basic reforms to lower drug prices. Three House Democrats voted AGAINST
lowering prescription costs last week. They all take huge sums of money
from Big Pharma and insurance companies.

Bernie and Justice Democrats are fighting back against the corporate greed
that is forcing everyday people to ration insulin and forego medications.
It’s not right. Democrats have promised this basic reform for years. Now,
Democrats are in control of Congress and still won’t rein in greedy drug
companies.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/67176?refcode=em20210921-19639&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]It’s time to elect real working-class progressives to Congress and
transform the Democratic Party into one that will not only lower
prescription drug costs, but also pass Medicare for All. Can you chip in
$3 to support our efforts to elect more progressives to
join Bernie, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Cori Bush in Congress? We’re
funded 100% by grassroots donations from folks like you, so every
contribution means the world to us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/67176?refcode=em20210921-19639&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]Chip in

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20210921-19639-footer&t=1027&refcode2=19639_1203867_VYPwBu&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=19639%2E1203867%2EVYPwBu

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Herschel Walker
subject: Democrats are in PANIC MODE.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. |
---
Peter,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a3b94d70129848b786bc48f037f175e5&_e=6vwYok9t1f8Y-bc6Na2ZVc8H-UDR9p2vVC56VOfe6brHEKS_8IeeoCoP9pqZL2W6aqpLozAwSGbHMLnVn3tr4MmAF3WMsT7IRNzr5lLVPb_GOyQdgDTxDO59cwIu0akFdsH8wb62t-5K5HpbJSVVWrYgCBDi2wasQ8FKXKi2zfBGLMBFosaiRcc0DO0vfKC9mT7e7C7Z47Klpb9eyDbJNthyasXPXCrm83Gnka-DRy0ZEx9SRtCsJtA5oT1weVeCi_dw5rxPgp5wrIwyWChHx5IaF-fmr09-_PbapbPYM9I5OYCoJI6uBXKo_qA6aA0ixxoWBoSAywLues0xXjdOW7qKCom4cJ42UIxEyBJP_mTt0-iF5q7u_rY7wwifXqy2j1hoAHDrpnxPsBpbiWdO7ckGtxlFqzoc2azHNELWQX3wdWBQZ-kRUHTkMA3epNmH6W2s17WC67kr-i5uHnp2Q5q9KWqnjg6B8dtmTPq6Jkw%3D)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

And, of course, it all takes money to operate. **[So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day, and I hope you'll help me reach my goal by making an immediate gift of whatever you can.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a3b94d70129848b786bc48f037f175e5&_e=6vwYok9t1f8Y-bc6Na2ZVc8H-UDR9p2vVC56VOfe6brHEKS_8IeeoCoP9pqZL2W6aqpLozAwSGbHMLnVn3tr4MmAF3WMsT7IRNzr5lLVPb_GOyQdgDTxDO59cwIu0akFdsH8wb62t-5K5HpbJSVVWrYgCBDi2wasQ8FKXKi2zfBGLMBFosaiRcc0DO0vfKC9mT7e7C7Z47Klpb9eyDbJNthyasXPXCrm83Gnka-DRy0ZEx9SRtCsJtA5oT1weVeCi_dw5rxPgp5wrIwyWChHx4PXD9REYstb_DydPw7_r2XT2xt7mP_9hS6AAHB6BVKnHMmt6O3bOUL6poEU80-h7Oh74zXb7aBjYsy7WqHJAEG4pivat7FoLq5qdZnhMeddEiFVJles4Jp76bUKmwD2Wts7uZciLO9VVzxAkpxUxAX7e8oZv5yMl9orcxe55rzhjqr3yVCHl3U63lyhIxa9wUpwLsYC3zR7PU252ntTkjM%3D)**

**[I'd be humbled if you would help me reach my daily goal of raising $10,000 by pitching in $5 or more right now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a3b94d70129848b786bc48f037f175e5&_e=6vwYok9t1f8Y-bc6Na2ZVc8H-UDR9p2vVC56VOfe6brHEKS_8IeeoCoP9pqZL2W6aqpLozAwSGbHMLnVn3tr4MmAF3WMsT7IRNzr5lLVPb_GOyQdgDTxDO59cwIu0akFdsH8wb62t-5K5HpbJSVVWrYgCBDi2wasQ8FKXKi2zfBGLMBFosaiRcc0DO0vfKC9mT7e7C7Z47Klpb9eyDbJNthyasXPXCrm83Gnka-DRy0ZEx9SRtCsJtA5oT1weVeCi_dw5rxPgp5wrIwyWChHx0pkJ6N5H4VvdYk9fBjjmJQ4Sfc1ISE0LHPYx5pVk6JjnjFrFoGS_BuLU6PTSiBloQGtDmu7GJnGHKBAKov3QAVkEhp7whoDnIFaCwYCRP7NsVsNdTQM8S9sV7IDZSZhs4lcCT506QDuhTK1ZmzwWe2H6XDgvHMa_-7VqjJnX7c6YXStfQfASxhPMDcoOv65bmqLkzxb28ooI5duiNkgBuc%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a3b94d70129848b786bc48f037f175e5&_e=6vwYok9t1f8Y-bc6Na2ZVc8H-UDR9p2vVC56VOfe6brHEKS_8IeeoCoP9pqZL2W6aqpLozAwSGbHMLnVn3tr4MmAF3WMsT7IRNzr5lLVPb_GOyQdgDTxDO59cwIu0akFdsH8wb62t-5K5HpbJSVVWrYgCBDi2wasQ8FKXKi2zfBGLMBFosaiRcc0DO0vfKC9mT7e7C7Z47Klpb9eyDbJNthyasXPXCrm83Gnka-DRy0ZEx9SRtCsJtA5oT1weVeCi_dw5rxPgp5wrIwyWChHxybYzuoibmbIPcFvVwTKRR6YhpYm3MCjWVqRjovFh7DDZwfCCW3C_YR6I8HYKuKZA8b7eOEktyVoojBwuPixA8pMpswUrCLV2kdV7436pe8_hzdtfv5I2yM4HG6i7GBSRL123vvveCpp-FkwclUjPjHdZuLzzIFAHgXH6-71Ir9MUArayBFxYya7vRh5DyF1Vx9cxsC1i2iP93xJcmi1ME8%3D)

clean_body: The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. | Peter, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. Respectfully, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and Democrat establishment know that they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning Georgia. I am counting on you, Peter, to help us win back the Senate. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Peter, things have been tough here in Nevada lately.

Under our current leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising violent crime rates.

We have a governor more interested in locking us out of work than putting us back to work.

Las Vegas became a sanctuary city.

People who work for a living are scared.

**I've had it.**

I'm sick of seeing Abortion clinics open while churches and schools are closed, and my grandkids playing soccer in masks.

I’ve seen a lot, Peter. But what’s happening in our state is hurting Nevadans. I can’t sit back and watch the state I love struggle.

**Under Governor Sisolak, Nevada is headed in the wrong direction.**

_That’s why after much careful consideration and prayer, I’ve decided to run for Governor._

**_To get Nevada back to work, and to serve Nevadans._**

I didn’t take the decision to run for Governor lightly. But, honestly, I couldn’t stand idly by as Nevadans suffer any longer.
[](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c8831767e607423faa0497d9bdc23e43&_e=4QEmeBqEg96SAd-BidMylyETkUT8h4raBiZMK6tjuAm6CscBEkcNxzQHsWIHdEBRy2JEPD4f9TvcnCmRL-8m5zIG5W-YPtYQPsbvUuFAS14selwFfMDbhDCCpmC0cvmPZxmvvDJEeqDLPVktlKkvQ_iuSkbNA9bnkUiZ6aCMUsFkk2cRIWSGLUNB1JCuJ9rahivXrYLoEK5GSliy0EJMMXSibYSjbYHvm9FM1L0iZvff36mk81NRYRJHJJGr11EcJLrmusqvWPLFppAzvMFEsXjz8XT95VlxA99nrRub_kjrv7wB1gGjqiSZMr83F487ewlFyaiEWCJNn2u_Ny1jmIAT8BQWEceUW5jCrst4cTqwGYUwhrgOh5PiYuAAsRO3WKzNjlTRl07kag8Q_xUsghlXhephL2u6olsy8x3QXb1PnYPVjuZ6drB3x6V7Itl43WkQQnI3WCObU-6t-1NH8HphS7zZSCAjHXjQbvibeoIR7DclYWml1Nb3JM5wgdps)

One of the things I am most excited about is getting on the road to talk to Nevadans on the campaign trail. I’m looking forward to getting the chance to hear the stories and struggles of folks like you.

And I know there will be tales of triumph, too. Because Nevadans are tough as nails, and not even hard times or bad leadership can keep us down.

**I may be the driver in this race, but a driver is only as good as his crew. **

I’m counting on you to see this thing through with me. That starts today.

**[If you are excited about this race to get Nevada back on the right track, would you consider chipping in $10 to my campaign today?](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c8831767e607423faa0497d9bdc23e43&_e=4QEmeBqEg96SAd-BidMylyETkUT8h4raBiZMK6tjuAm6CscBEkcNxzQHsWIHdEBRy2JEPD4f9TvcnCmRL-8m5zIG5W-YPtYQPsbvUuFAS14selwFfMDbhDCCpmC0cvmPZxmvvDJEeqDLPVktlKkvQ_iuSkbNA9bnkUiZ6aCMUsFkk2cRIWSGLUNB1JCuJ9rahivXrYLoEK5GSliy0EJMMXSibYSjbYHvm9FM1L0iZvff36mk81NRYRJHJJGr11EcJLrmusqvWPLFppAzvMFEsXjz8XT95VlxA99nrRub_kguJ6XBWAJ9Bx3EG1sIZohhlYTYwenNeUrh7peLlyolR5qoJ0KM3z5-dqq_COPcWkluxAY-C8u96FRe6adFJquIf4rVaEloEDKJgdocfSsd1cJESm09KX0fgs-uWo63kpZzzBR0Tx4BCXi6ZDeIN1TDOoBR71gvxtqclviQH57z2n6bhBnYpvr5GFhJDIJFKQPiZS8noarLtJ4Y4Sjn6w1l)**

With a team that is Nevada Tough, I know we can do anything, Peter.

This race means everything to me and to the future of Nevada.

_The finish line is in Carson City, and I’ll see you there. _

clean_body: | | | | This is the biggest week of the year. Dear Peter, We reached out to you yesterday seeking support before our big End-of-Quarter deadline. We didn't hear back from you. This is the biggest deadline of the year. Far-left billionaires like Mike Bloomberg, Tom Steyer, and George Soros will have this report on their desks to determine our strength, and when they should attack next. That's why some of our supporters have asked me to EXTEND our 400% MATCH BONUS through MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. If you and 200 other Patriots stepped up TODAY and contributed at least $50 ($200 MATCHED), we would crush our fundraising goals today and ward off our opposition. I've had your back when I stood strong for the issues American Patriots care most deeply about. Do you have mine? Peter, we're counting on your support. Fellow American,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d709c266b1844628e426a8962ad2d8e&_e=nbuag6BAp9jJDW49Y9EILC9pfahXd5KbyKuWyIzJzddf8vW9mz_YGBQN5iBzJnkd5KFRIKJInQhuppyycnU8zV8aC9rAcO9tCGMdIySvyhG7sAUxPfyYIgIlC0T7Tx2JpnBZ7XPUU8ITHx_hMW_UOSVTKvfO_9mnUosOXr_4f4C-trXvcIEeip_vOZNXFhHh2tXjsmhxR7icouAK_hr-4YGCm526dQajExuwSQ2IllmYtY7dwxryMKfNE4Hutq6gr3zja6zOnYPV3BEWWHqnk7vFcM3AwNFUDJf2mIbL3LwD2KcnMOF3k0g9Q1VeMN3Gx9vx_J1cCkzUxvZZIrL3DAdVtwUT0onX1V5pm5kdZuIMnIFund5nBZ8qtxc-yb0T4E4L9e4-z_pMBRySzeBon3RvGBe9Ud4SB2UTZQY3aXNzMyJUX_6BCabufjueng_KRHxhsanQKLMa_ZAnxGQwrA%3D%3D)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

And, of course, it all takes money to operate. **[So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. | | |
---
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhkRCb1IEUbKN0NGVinwHycy0zhZnNHb8-fCzX4KtoZFGA_VpLRnIRhMPfGNA71gJxNjGsrkCGxyOUTEN2Td5Lnm68gOazhpXZoD3VqG2_-H6FQdizcs_OKyqh-hmsnEzDPR7z5_GixHaNHfWiEEz6Dbm7ZipfEq3G6iE7-A0V7gQgu-SkavdSurDYVfCg-LPqOHu1Ra00vHIJeNeV-tgYGu10VlcaU7XdhmJP7Sk4n3gPjPH_FqBcg57tCWPopCS1fhf6_SjsSWTVZBXihcBH5iE47zl5st136PBhTy7sF5x9r7Q7qDbb1PqbjQXEFwRZNIaRYbxUBRd-qvoEuuEekV9Qt7a4EcW2QGEB9Dfg3XuedMo7ufmWfGMcntTPWaFeSdpfW3D8VwpOYelJFQdYX91ZAFURpjrvC4n705G-T1iNCzxkapkjSMNRJt1Zb3o/3fi/Gey1HlWQQFC8FBP9Arx26g/h0/zhNTy6KYGPYMeouPi0H2fogJ3DnndpIPrgAXRKx8vQ4)
| | **It’s official:_Dean Heller has announced his bid for governor, making him my 5th Republican opponent._** There’s no other way to say it: Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada. Nevada needs a governor who will **expand access to health care** — _not someone who voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act._ Nevada needs a governor who will lift up **working families** — _not a Trump lackey who prioritizes tax breaks for the wealthy._ Nevada needs a governor who **stands up for reproductive freedom** — __instead of someone who says he “liked what Texas did” and promises to pass the most conservative abortion laws possible.__
### [We’ve set a $15,000 rapid response goal to set the record on my newest opponent. clean_body: | | | | | It’s official:Dean Heller has announced his bid for governor, making him my 5th Republican opponent. There’s no other way to say it: Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada. Nevada needs a governor who will expand access to health care — not someone who voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Nevada needs a governor who will lift up working families — not a Trump lackey who prioritizes tax breaks for the wealthy. Nevada needs a governor who stands up for reproductive freedom — instead of someone who says he “liked what Texas did” and promises to pass the most conservative abortion laws possible. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for standing with me, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
If Bernie’s $3.5 trillion bill currently under consideration in the Senate passes, you can look at him as your mortgage lender because he will have mo |
Fellow patriot,

**Would you trust Bernie Sanders with your personal finances**?

If Bernie’s $3.5 trillion bill currently under consideration in the Senate passes, **you can look at him as your mortgage lender** because he will have mortgaged the future of every man, woman, and child living in the United States.

Republicans have been emailing and sounding the alarm about Bernie’s bill for weeks on end now, but we’re only getting tepid responses.

**[How would you feel if Bernie Sanders sent you a bill for $24,000? That’s what is about to happen if we don’t act fast.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1f518ad730754095a717c619c99f4d61&_e=X-RqF7gGCgnsV7N2I5bHU8FrpIMrLDPwouUGmzL6oX11-TXVP9_HcuggylK8_DTmBRohM5ZivRkNCG2ALDvoSkFDf49PKOjo1pTCpUhLtRTMQmZrNiAMY3KfKionNHEBBDPGqB0c3WRUejytwdTmHAVIOTzpKCD_ePnNe5SaCGlBb8y8KI6zIyE8_w_kDDQ-U_LxXz_apekiNDvDSAMrKqZdDDkOT7mp8_j16ncRselJ6cqKeaicNarju-RVE0GPZDDDdRtklXi2E8siePEwwytlfAVMaHeIJoTzcTzsieKT9RntsZ9jCSHVn-LjSHmQRgCKpJdjhIPFH373aL1b4tTmyVM7o13ubpvXUnHGBGXCukKcQgeyjEOpN3haFDNR8JnCLLvSBISLSlHExMS1dZW-7aBA1b_z7K0BeVbaAbL2wa3CozaQGquvFidDAOgTMd38QQcF3kzjEmcJeRwL01FduRpbR7xzS6R74WBiELA%3D)**
